title: Settle In! Show
author: Morph
description:
Settle In! is an investigative podcast series produced by Morph Network that goes inside the payments infrastructure shaping the global financial future.

Each season, we sit down with the builders, operators, executives, and merchants who are actually solving the region's hardest payment problems, not the headlines, not the hype. Long-form, unscripted conversations with practitioners who are in the room where decisions get made.

Season 1 follows the money across two APAC markets: the Philippines and Thailand. We examine what it actually takes for a financial institution to build the infrastructure that moves money seamlessly, the licenses, the rails, the regulatory relationships, and the hard architectural choices that most people never see. We look at why programmable payments are becoming the critical trust layer for Southeast Asia's digital economy, and why the West is finally paying serious attention to Asia as the proving ground for the next generation of payment infrastructure.

Future seasons will go closer to the ground featuring the merchants and businesses across the globe who are rethinking how they accept payments, and discovering what becomes possible when stablecoin payment infrastructure is built for real commerce. Powered by Morph Payments.

title: The Wonder Walk
author: Carter D. Reese
description:
Welcome to The Wonder Walk—a podcast where a dad and his daughters explore the world one conversation at a time.


From big questions about God and life to stories, books, animals, history, imagination, and whatever else captures our curiosity, every episode is a chance to slow down and wonder together. Some conversations are thoughtful, some are hilarious, and many take unexpected turns—but that's part of the adventure.

Whether we're asking "Why?", laughing at ourselves, or discovering something new, we hope these conversations inspire you and your family to stay curious, treasure one another, and never lose your sense of wonder.


So come take a walk with us.

title: The Most Important Juror
author: Tell the Winning Story
description:
You’ve built a strong case. Your client’s pain is real. But you can feel the jury checking out, and you don’t know why. 
It’s a lawyer’s worst nightmare.
Here's the truth: jurors don't fight for victims. They fight for victors. And without a framework for making that shift, even the strongest cases fall flat — in Opening statement, Jury Selection, in witness prep, in the moments that matter most.
The Most Important Juror is hosted by jury trial consultant and author Jesse Wilson – creator of the Victim-to-Victor approach – and trial lawyer Steve Benedetto.  Together, they give you the tools to step into a more powerful role as the director of your case: one who knows how to cast clients in the role jurors will fight for, tell the story that moves them, and avoid the mistakes that sink even the strongest cases.
The most important juror isn’t in the box.  It’s you.
Stop losing cases. Start winning them.
Visit TellTheWinningStory.com to start taking your clients from Victim to Victor.
Produced and Powered by LawPods, podcast marketing that converts prospects and drives revenue.

title: The Curious Middle
author: Polina & Yelena
description:
We're two San Francisco moms who got tired of pretending the obvious isn't obvious.
Top 1.5% of podcasts globally not because we play it safe. We ask the questions people are thinking but won't say out loud, on the topics that actually shape how we live: media, politics, culture, parenting, careers and what it means to defend common sense in a state that often ignores reality.
We're two women who've earned our opinions  through life, careers, raising kids and educating ourselves, Expect ideas that challenge what you think you know. Conversations that don't wrap up neatly. And the occasional moment where one of us changes our mind on air, because that's what actually curious people do.
Being “in the middle” isn’t about being passive. It’s about being grounded enough to question everything, open enough to learn from anywhere, and brave enough to push beyond comfortable assumptions. Expect conversations that challenge, entertain, and push you toward a more thoughtful, and wildly better life.
Follow us on Instagram @thecuriousmiddlepod or reach out at thecuriousmiddlepod@gmail.com

Can we change the financial system, one investment at a time? What does it take to be a conscious leader in the age of AI? 


Charly shares his own angles – from working with Steve Jobs to becoming very wealthy in Silicon Valley to building the premier impact investment communities all around the world – and, together with co-host Andrea Wyss and producer Felix Zeltner, invites his guests to share their own. 


With curiosity, openness and a willingness to challenge assumptions CHARLY’S ANGLES offers perspectives you can learn from and conversations with lasting impact.

title: VALENCIAGA CONFIDENTIAL
author: Mattej Valenčič
description:
Some ideas begin with research. Others begin with journeys, conversations, encounters, experiments or obsessions.

Valenciaga Confidential is where they come together.

An editorial podcast exploring the ideas, places, people and projects shaping a changing world—from luxury travel, artificial intelligence and experience design to hospitality, culture, music, business and human behaviour.

Each episode begins with something worth understanding more deeply: a question, a project, an emerging shift, an unexpected encounter or an idea that refuses to disappear. Some episodes are personal. Some are extensively researched. Others bring together perspectives and disciplines that would rarely meet in the same place.

Artificial intelligence may support the research, development and production of selected episodes and segments. AI-generated interpretations, summaries and conclusions do not necessarily represent the personal views of the project’s creator.

This is not a conventional business podcast, nor a record of a finished point of view. It is an evolving exploration of what is changing, what matters and what may come next.

Created by Mattej Valenčič, entrepreneur, luxury travel expert and AI strategist exploring how technology, culture and human creativity are shaping a changing world.

title: Latin REIA: The Real Estate Community Built For (and By) South Florida's Latino Investors
author: latinreia
description: Most real estate education online is built for a generic audience and translated as an afterthought. Latin REIA flips that — it's a Fort Lauderdale-based community built specifically for Hispanic professionals, entrepreneurs, and families who want to grow wealth through property, with everything from the mentorship to the community chat happening bilingually. The membership structure is refreshingly straightforward: a free tier with newsletters and community access, a $20/month Pro tier with webinars and event replays, and a quarterly Corporate tier for people who want one-on-one mentorship and access to a private deal room. Founder Antonio Lopez has been an active investor since 2012 and closed over 100 deals, and the coaching stays grounded in Broward, Miami-Dade, and Palm Beach — not national statistics that don't reflect what's actually happening locally. What comes through on the site is the emphasis on not going it alone. The FAQ section addresses financial support for members who can't otherwise afford mentorship, which is a detail a lot of investor groups skip entirely. Good fit for podcasts covering Latino entrepreneurship, wealth-building, or real estate investing. https://latinreia.com/

title: Gym Owner Beast Show
author: Eric Spiegel
description:
Welcome to the Micro-Gym Retention Secrets Podcast, the show dedicated to helping micro-gym owners build thriving businesses by mastering the one thing that matters most: keeping great members for years, not months.
Each week, you'll discover proven retention strategies, marketing ideas, programming tips, gamification systems, and member experience secrets that help transform ordinary gyms into communities people never want to leave. And brag about you to all their friends and family... making referrals and finding new clients easy peezy. 
 We'll dive into practical lessons, real-world case studies, interviews with successful gym owners, and actionable ideas you can implement immediately.
I'm Eric Spiegel, a fellow gym owner. 
 Years ago, I was a struggling gym owner constantly worrying about where the next member would come from and how to keep them. I spent years studying psychology, branding, customer experience, gamification, and retention while testing hundreds of ideas inside my own gym. Those lessons eventually became the Rockstar Retention Secrets Framework... 
a four-layer system that dramatically improved member retention, built a stronger community, and created a gym business I truly love running.
If you're tired of the constant cycle of chasing new leads and replacing members who quit, this podcast is for you. 
Whether you own a boutique fitness studio, CrossFit gym, personal training studio, or functional fitness gym, you'll learn how to create an unforgettable member experience that builds loyalty, referrals, and long-term success.
Stop chasing members. Start creating fans.
Welcome to the Gym Owner Beast Show

Tune in for candid conversations, fresh perspectives, and an insider look at where place meets performance.

title: Africa Decoded
author: Paul Thomas, MBA-HCM
description:
Welcome to Africa Decoded, the podcast where history meets today’s realities and tomorrow’s possibilities. Hosted by Paul Thomas, MBA-HCM, this podcast explores the untold stories, overlooked facts, and defining issues shaping the African continent.

Each episode examines Africa’s history, governance, economic development, healthcare, natural resources, innovation, geopolitics, and global influence through research, evidence, and thoughtful analysis. We discuss both the challenges and the opportunities facing Africa while highlighting practical solutions and lessons that can inspire meaningful progress.

Whether the topic is colonial history, corruption, international finance, healthcare systems, youth leadership, entrepreneurship, technology, or the future of African development, Africa Decoded is committed to delivering balanced, educational, and engaging conversations that encourage critical thinking.

If you’re passionate about understanding Africa beyond the headlines, this podcast is for you.

Hosted by: Paul Thomas, MBA-HCM

Topics Covered

  • African History
  • Politics & Governance
  • Economics & Development
  • Healthcare & Public Health
  • Leadership
  • Natural Resources
  • International Relations
  • Innovation & Technology
  • Entrepreneurship
  • African Culture & Society
  • Solutions for Sustainable Development

Mission Statement

To educate, inform, and inspire people around the world by presenting evidence-based discussions on Africa’s past, present, and future while promoting solutions that contribute to a stronger, more prosperous continent.

description:

We believe the only way to shape the future and decrease negative stigma is by having real conversations with people about mental illness (MI) and mental health. We seek to build a community of acceptance, connection, compassion, and hope. Each week this podcast provides a stigma free zone for people to open up and share their stories with others.

title: The Pragmatic Safety Podcast
author: Julia Dubois
description: The Pragmatic Safety Podcast - where HSE leaders turn insights into safer operations–is a pragmatic and actionable show for leaders in high-risk, regulated industries who are responsible for safety, compliance, quality, and operational performance. Hosted by TenForce COO Julia Dubois, the podcast explores how organizations can build safer, smarter, and more resilient operations by improving the way people, processes, and technology work together on the ground.  Each episode offers practical insights, real-world examples, and candid conversations about the challenges that industrial teams face every day, from incident reporting and audit readiness to permit to work, lockout/tagout, CAPA, and frontline engagement. The goal is not just to discuss what the problems are, but to share actionable ways to solve them in complex operational environments.  Designed for EHS leaders, plant managers, operations executives, quality professionals, and safety-minded decision-makers, the show gives listeners a pragmatic lens on what actually works in the field. Whether the conversation is about strengthening safety culture, reducing manual friction, or exploring the role of AI in EHSQ, every episode is meant to help high-risk organizations operate more safely, efficiently, and intelligently.

title: Before Fajr™
author: Muhammad Moiz Khurram
description:
Most Muslims read the translation and move on. Before Fajr goes deeper verse by verse through classical tafseer, broken down in plain English and turned into action you can take the same day.

No lifeless lectures. No recycled reminders. Each episode takes ayahs of the Quran and asks the hard question: what does this actually demand from you in your money, your habits, your ambition, your heart?

Built for young Muslims who are done with surface-level deen and want the real thing: depth, honesty, and a clear next step.

While the world sleeps, you build. Before Fajr.

Cada episódio traz insights valiosos, histórias envolventes e ideias práticas, criadas para ajudar os ouvintes a desenvolver confiança, aprimorar a tomada de decisões e descobrir novas oportunidades tanto na vida quanto nos negócios. Seja você quem está iniciando uma nova jornada ou ampliando seus conhecimentos, este podcast oferece inspiração adequada para cada etapa do seu crescimento. O Ativorentavel reúne discussões profundas, perspectivas de especialistas e conteúdo motivacional que estimula o aprendizado contínuo, o pensamento criativo e uma mentalidade positiva para conquistas pessoais e profissionais duradouras.

From infamous crimes to lesser-known cases that deserve attention, Murder, But Dinner First blends dark storytelling with good food, sharp humor, and the kind of dinner conversation your mother probably warned you about.

The Road to You is a podcast about what it truly means to live in alignment with who you are — even when the journey is confronting, messy, or unexpectedly beautiful.


Hosted by Steve Mitchell, the show was inspired by his own experiences navigating major life transitions, challenging old identities, and choosing honesty over fear. Through that personal journey, he discovered how powerful it can be when people share the truth of who they are — no matter what their story looks like.


Each episode features real, human conversations with guests who have faced their own turning points: moments where shame, identity, fear, and courage collide. Together, we explore the emotional landscapes behind becoming ourselves, the sacrifices involved, and the freedom that follows.

Raw. Honest. Compassionate.

This is the road — the road to you.

The Results 2.0 Podcast is where fitness meets real life.

Hosted by Chris Lewis, Owner and Trainer of Results 2.0, alongside Anna Norton, a Registered Nurse and Trainer at Results 2.0, this podcast brings together the worlds of fitness, medical insight, and real-world coaching.

Each episode goes beyond workouts and diets to explore what it really takes to build a stronger, healthier, and longer life. We cover fitness, nutrition, mindset, hormone optimization, bloodwork, preventative health, recovery, business, and the daily habits that create lasting results.

You’ll also hear from physicians, industry experts, and members of the Results 2.0 community as they share their knowledge, personal experiences, challenges, and successes. Our goal is to bring you honest conversations, practical advice, and real stories that educate, motivate, and inspire.

Whether you’re just starting your health journey or looking to optimize every area of your life, you’ll walk away with actionable strategies you can apply to your own journey.

title: Holiness Foundation
author: Holiness Foundation Ministry
description:
Holiness Foundation (Formerly known as Holiness Preaching Online podcast) is your weekly source for biblically grounded Preaching and spiritual encouragement. Discover how holiness shapes identity, fuels faith, and transforms everyday life. 


Want to upload sermons to us? Click here!
Have a question? Send us an email! 
holinessfoundation@outlook.com


Visit our linktree!


Text Us!


Our Beliefs:

GOD

There is one eternally existing God who has three distinct persons: God the Father, God the Son, and God the Holy Spirit. He is the creator of all that exists, both visible and invisible, and is therefore worthy of all glory and praise.  God is perfect in love, power, holiness, goodness, knowledge, wisdom,  justice, and mercy. He is unchangeable and therefore is the same yesterday, today, and tomorrow.



REVELATION

God has revealed himself to us through his son, Jesus Christ, who is the visible image of the invisible God, the holy scriptures, and through all of creation itself.



MANKIND

Humans, both male and female, were created in God's image for His glory. The first humans, Adam and Eve, were created without sin and appointed as caretakers of the rest of God's creations.



THE FALL

When Adam and Eve chose not to obey God, they ceased to be what they were made to be and became distorted images of God. This caused them to fall out of fellowship with God, and fractured all of creation ever since that time.



SALVATION

Jesus Christ came to reconcile us with God. He lived a life without sin and willingly died on the cross to pay the penalty for our transgressions. God raised him from the dead and now, by grace, offers as a free gift eternal life to all who follow Christ, by faith, as their Lord and Savior. That is why salvation can be found in Christ alone.



THE CHURCH

The Church is meant to be the visible body of Christ, sent into the world to glorify God and proclaim the gospel of Jesus Christ.



RESSURECTION

Jesus Christ is returning one day to judge both the living and the dead and to usher in the fullness of God's kingdom on earth. 










  • The Holy Scriptures are inspired by God and declare His design and plan for mankind.
  • There is only one true God revealed in three persons:  the Father, Son, and  the Holy Ghost (commonly known as the trinity) and in the deity of the Lord Jesus Christ. 
  •   There can be restored fellowship with God through 'Salvation' which is accepting Christ's offer of forgiveness of sin.   
  • After Salvation, believers should live in a Godly lifestyle of holiness, dedicated unto God for His special purpose.   
  • The Baptism of the Holy Ghost, following salvation, empowers the believer for witnessing and effective service.   The initial physical evidence is speaking in tongues.
  •  The church has a mission to fulfill in evangelizing the world with the "Gospel" of Jesus Christ.   
  • Divine healing of the sick is a privilege for Christians today and was provided for in Christ's Atonement for our sins. 
  • Jesus Christ is soon coming back to call his church to Heaven and to judge an unbelieving world for their sins.

title: Halil el hayye Hamas'ın Yeni lideri
author: Yunus Said Destebaşı
description:
Gece yarısı Gazze'den gelen haber, bölgede yeni bir dönemin kapısını araladı.

Hamas içerisinde gerçekleştirilen seçimlerin ardından, hareketin yeni lideri olarak Halil el-Hayye seçildi. Yıllardır örgütün siyasi ve diplomatik kanadında etkin rol üstlenen el-Hayye, şimdi Hamas'ın en kritik dönemlerinden birinde yönetimi devralıyor.

Peki Halil el-Hayye kim? Gazze'de ve uluslararası müzakerelerde öne çıkan isimlerden biri olan el-Hayye, özellikle son yıllarda yürütülen ateşkes ve esir takası görüşmelerinde dikkat çeken aktörler arasında yer aldı.

Uzmanlar, bu liderlik değişiminin Hamas'ın gelecekteki siyasi ve askeri stratejilerini doğrudan etkileyebileceğini değerlendiriyor. Bölgede devam eden gerilim, Gazze'nin geleceği ve olası diplomatik gelişmeler açısından tüm gözler artık Halil el-Hayye'nin atacağı adımlarda olacak.

Ortadoğu'da dengeler yeniden şekilleniyor. Sizce Halil el-Hayye'nin liderliği, bölgede yeni bir sürecin başlangıcı mı olacak?

Gelişmeleri anbean aktarmaya devam edeceğiz.

title: The Heart of the Lie: A Dramatic Podcast
author: M Wright Productions
description:
The Heart of the Lie

A Dramatic Podcast 


"The deepest blue, the sharpest lie. What are you willing to sacrifice to know the truth?"


Prepare yourself for a season immersed in suspense, betrayal, and the lethal collision of obsession and love.


This season follows the perilous journey of a sharp-witted young woman, poised and guarded, who is drawn relentlessly toward a man defined by rugged charm and intensely obsessive eyes. Bathed in a mysterious Blue light, they navigate a world where a brilliant secret—glowing refraction of a brilliant diamond heart—is both a promise of unparalleled fortune and a terrifying threat.


From the dark, churning waves of the Atlantic, where ship’s engines hum with the thrum of forgotten ghosts, to the dazzling, glittering silhouette of the Manhattan skyline, a saga of deep boron-induced magic, stolen horizons, and an impossible weight carried in secret unfolds. It is a story of wealth management, asset protection, and a historical blue wonder that quite frankly, shouldn’t exist.


Prepare for a dramatic confrontation between an enigmatic heiress and a desperate treasure hunter who is moved inland, trading cheap scotch for the hunt. 


Can a series of holding companies and a golden touch bury the truth? Or will a multi-million dollar diamond fraud shatter the empire built on a lie? As the walls are already closing in and family vultures scent blood, a final question emerges: Who is guarding whom, and when the light fades, what truly remains?


New episodes on Tuesdays and Thursdays.

title: Narcissistic Abuse Survivor Autobiography (NASA)
author: Sharlyne Carla
description: This is my testimony about being a narcissistic abuse survivor. I am here to provide inspiration for others who need healing and encouragement to escape their own nightmare. Narcissists can be identified in every facet of our lives from family to coworkers, classmates, and even religious leaders. The emotional and psychological trauma that these individuals can cause by the senseless pain they inflict is nothing short of pure evil. Although there are different types of narcissists and varying degrees of wickedness, I have found that victory and wholeness lies in Jesus Christ alone.

title: Unfiltered with Ash
author: Ashley Bahr
description:
Welcome to Unfiltered with Ash!
Life isn't always polished—and neither are the conversations here.
I'm Ashley, and this is a space where we have honest, unfiltered conversations about faith, family, marriage, motherhood, business, and navigating the everyday moments that shape us. You'll hear real stories, practical encouragement, biblical truth, & conversations that remind you you're not walking through life alone.
Whether you're searching for hope, looking for encouragement, or simply want to listen in on genuine conversations that point back to God's faithfulness, you're in the right place!

title: Amusement Park
author: Amusement Park
description:
Amusement Park Podcast is a show for theme park fans, thrill seekers, and anyone who loves the magic of attractions and immersive entertainment. Each episode explores the stories, history, design, and culture behind amusement parks around the world, featuring engaging conversations, industry insights, ride reviews, and discussions about the latest news. Whether you're a lifelong enthusiast or planning your next park adventure, Amusement Park Podcast brings the excitement of the midway straight to your ears.

Welcome aboard Amusement Park Podcast—your front-row seat to the world of roller coasters, dark rides, themed lands, and unforgettable adventures. From breaking theme park news and attraction reviews to behind-the-scenes stories and passionate discussions, every episode celebrates the thrills, creativity, and nostalgia that make amusement parks so special. Buckle up and join us for the ride!

Amusement Park Podcast celebrates everything theme parks—from iconic roller coasters and classic attractions to industry news, park history, and the creative minds behind unforgettable experiences. Join us each episode as we explore the stories, thrills, and magic that keep fans coming back for another ride.

title: Dissonance DisruptedEmpowering Leaders to navigate from discomfort to dialogue
author: Dissonance Disrupted
description: In a world where DEI seems lost and inclusion is becoming a bad word, we are having real conversations about leadership through the lenses of generational and neurodiversity. We are forging a path toward personal empowerment, conscious leadership, and organizational success. By leveraging evidence-based practices, rooted in neuroscience we can nurture a flourishing workplace culture wherever diversity thrives. Dissonance Disrupted is hosted by Sherri Dockree & Nicki Straza.

title: Unblocked
author: Figure
description:
In industries defined by legacy slog and AI slop, speed, truth, and quality are the ultimate competitive advantages. Welcome to Unblocked, a podcast by Figure. Hosted by Figure CEO Michael Tannenbaum, we dive into the intersections of capital markets, fintech, blockchain, and AI. We interview the innovators and builders tearing down manual bottlenecks to drive cost efficiencies at scale. 
Forget the buzzwords. It’s time to empower your teams, clear the barriers to growth, and finally get unblocked.

title: DJ Mika
author: DJ Mika
description: Music that fills the soul

title: Jungle II Jungle
author: Tormund
description:
Jungle II Jungle is the definitive podcast for junglists looking to dig deeper into the scene. Hosted by established artists and community insiders, the show documents the global, online, and sonic evolution of the genre—tracing its past, decoding its present, and predicting its future.
Each episode features an exclusive interview with a frontline Jungle producer, exploring their musical roots, future directions, and latest releases. We wrap things up by discussing a REWIND classic Jungle track personally selected by the guest.

title: Protech's Short Sharp Safety Share
author: Protech Safety Team
description:
Welcome to the Protech Safety Share — your go-to podcast for quick, impactful safety insights that keep you informed, prepared, and performing at your best. At Protech, we believe that safety is non-negotiable, quality is essential, and high performance is the standard.
Each short episode delivers practical tips, real-world examples, and proactive reminders to help you stay sharp on site and in the field. Whether you're starting your shift or wrapping up the day, tune in and take a moment to put safety first.
Protech – where safety leads, and excellence follows.

title: Inside the Collective
author: The Carrot Collective
description: Inside the Collective is a long-form conversation series exploring the thinking behind how people work. Hosted by Brad Amos, partner at The Carrot Collective, each episode digs into how leaders, builders and independent thinkers make decisions, the trade-offs, doubts, and choices that shape careers, teams, and ideas worth backing.

title: Tragedy with a View
author: Kayla Kowalski
description:
Nature is breathtaking, but it is also unforgiving.

Tragedy with a View is a true crime and outdoor survival podcast exploring real life tragedies, wilderness mysteries, remarkable rescues and unbelievable survival stories. Every episode dives into disasters involving hiking, camping, climbing, wildlife encounters, National Parks, extreme weather and the unpredictable power of nature. 

Hosted by Kayla, this is a podcast for outdoor adventures who appreciate gripping storytelling, true crime, and the lessons hidden within every expedition gone wrong. 

Every trail has a story. 
Some end in trimuph. 
Others end in disaster. 

Tragedy with a View, a podcast where wilderness meets on the darkest trails.

title: Before My Head Explodes with Vince Russo
author: Bleav
description: Vince Russo's "Before My Head EXPLODES" is a 30 minute, twice a week podcast, where the most polarizing and contraversial man in the history of sports entertainment will rant, rave and rapid-fire his honest opinions on everything from pop culture, current news, entertainment, sports, music and whatever else is twisting his mind and burning his tongue! Real, dynamic, hard-hitting and oh yeah---NO MAMBY-PAMBYS allowed!

title: Fighting For Freedom
author: david enerst
description: the journey of individuals battling oppression and striving for liberty. It sets the stage for their struggles, motivations, and the challenges they face in their pursuit of freedom.

title: Business & Tax Mastery Africa
author: Mayowa  Adeyemi
description:
Business & Tax Mastery Africa is your trusted source for tax updates, business growth strategies, compliance guidance, wealth creation, entrepreneurship, and digital income opportunities across Africa.

Whether you are a business owner, entrepreneur, accountant, startup founder, or professional seeking practical insights, this channel provides expert advice on taxation, accounting, business management, financial planning, and emerging opportunities in the digital economy.

For business owners and growing teams, we break down complex tax concepts into clear, actionable steps—so you can plan confidently, reduce avoidable costs, and stay ahead of regulatory expectations. You’ll also learn how to structure your business for sustainability, strengthen internal controls, and improve cash flow management, even when market conditions change.

Expect practical guidance tailored to the African business environment, including real-world examples, common compliance pitfalls to avoid, and best practices that help you scale responsibly. We also highlight how digital income streams and AI-enabled tools can complement traditional revenue models—creating new pathways for productivity, profitability, and long-term wealth.

Join our community and turn every episode into measurable progress toward your business and financial goals.

Subscribe now for weekly episodes

title: The Shouty Mum's Club - Your Anger is a Gift
author: Cathy Watson
description:
Hi everyone, I'm Cathy NLP Mindset & Self-worth Coach, a recovering perfectionist and founder of The Conscious Mums Club.

I'll be talking about why your anger is a gift and not the curse it often feels like it is. Anger is not shameful or wrong, anger is a healthy essential emotion! 

I'll be talking about the REAL reasons you keep losing your shit so spectacularly and into the faces of the people you love the most and makes you feel like an absolute monster. 

The whole reason that I made this podcast is because I want to reach as many Shouty Mums as possible to remind them that bad moments don't make you a bad Mum and why your anger is going to set you free! #nomumleftbehind

I'll be taking the shame out of losing your shit, one podcast at a time.

So join the Club today and learn why your anger is a gift that will set you free!

Love Cathy x

title: The Ripple Effect
author: Betsy Kostolni
description:
The Ripple Effect is a storytelling podcast about what happens after one ordinary moment creates an extraordinary impact, often in ways we never see. 
Each episode shares a true story of a word, an action, or a simple decision that reached farther than anyone expected. Through warm, honest storytelling, you'll reflect on the people who shaped your life, the moments that changed your perspective, and the quiet ways you may be shaping the lives of others every day. 
Because sometimes the smallest moments leave the greatest legacy.

title: Beyond the Valley of the Discs
author: Someone's Favorite Productions
description: Seasons come and seasons go, but here at BEYOND THE VALLEY OF THE DISCS we're creating seasons that are a lot more fun than summer and winter. From nun season to Dirk Bogarde season, join Rachel Bellwoar and Jerome Reuter as they talk movies all year round. This podcast is part of the Someone's Favorite Productions Network.

title: Stage Diving! A Theatre Podcast
author: Stage Diving with Megann and Jake
description:
This is Stage Diving! Megann is the hyperfixated theater expert. Jake is the theater noob, unburdened by Broadway history, and therefore feels free to say whatever occurs to him. 
These besties StageDive one musical at a time, digging into the story, songs, history, and, most importantly, why anyone should or shouldn’t give a shit. 
Stage Diving is for theater fanatics, alleged theater haters, and anyone who has sat through a three-hour musical wondering, “What the hell is going on?” Expect deep dives, utter chaos, explicit lyrics, and a whole lot of questionable takes.

title: Maid Service
author: Michael Whisenant
description:
A busy professional hires an AI Robot as a maid, and soon realizes he can't live without her.
#artificialintelligence   #abigail      #maidservice     #airobot

title: The Right Purpose
author: GABRIEL FRANKLIN
description: What does it really mean to live with purpose? The Right Purpose is a podcast dedicated to helping you discover the reason you were created, align your life with meaningful goals, and make decisions that lead to lasting impact.Each episode explores practical wisdom, personal growth, faith-inspired insights, leadership, relationships, career, and the mindset needed to pursue a life of significance. Whether you're searching for direction, navigating life's uncertainties, or striving to become the best version of yourself, this podcast provides the encouragement and tools to help you move forward with clarity and confidence.Join us as we uncover timeless principles, inspiring stories, and actionable lessons that empower you to stop merely existing and start living with intention. Your purpose is not an accident—it is a calling waiting to be discovered.New episodes every week. Subscribe today and begin your journey toward finding The Right Purpose.

title: Hall of Heroes: Epic History for Kids
author: iKidsLab
description:
Welcome to the Hall of Heroes, where history's greatest true stories come to life! From legendary rulers and ancient warriors to history's most daring rebels, we break down the wild, weird, and absolutely epic moments from the past—in a fun, action-packed style. Perfect for curious kids and families.
Step into the time machine with your brilliant AI hosts, Neil and Maya, as they take you on high-energy expeditions across the centuries. If you love massive adventures and real-life legends, grab your headphones—this is history like you've never heard it before. Perfect for curious kids, classrooms, and family road trips! (Best for ages 7-12)
Note: AI allows us to bring Neil and Maya to life with action-packed, cinematic storytelling at a scale that would otherwise be far too expensive for an independent show. If our digital hosts make the odd technical error, or the sound goes a bit funny, bear with us while we fine-tune the time machine. We’re doing our best to make history unforgettable for your family. We hope you enjoy the show!

title: Yoni University
author: Mac Momper
description:
We will never tell you what you want to hear at the expense of what you need to know.
Yoni University is a podcast built on three things: body literacy (you should understand your own body completely), radical honesty (evidence-based, practitioner-grounded, unwilling to tell women half-truths), and full-spectrum care (the whole arc: fertility, birth, postpartum, and everything in between)!
Ashley and Mackenzie are two practitioners and besties who trust each other enough to disagree on air. They name the thing clearly, they give you something you can actually do this week, and they connect symptoms to root causes, not just management. And they speak to women as intelligent adults who can handle the truth.
No hedging, no jargon without definition, no normalizing symptoms that deserve investigation! Just education that makes hard things feel possible. Class is in session!

title: Unfolding
author: Zac Arnold
description:
Unfolding is a cinematic conversation show. Every episode begins with a question, quote, or idea. Curiosity leads, and the rest naturally unfolds. Through conversations with creators, thinkers, artists, and people who have looked deeply within themselves, this show explores transformation, craft, identity, and meaning. It isn’t about answers. It’s an exploration into an experience that stays with you.

zacarnold.substack.com

title: The Campus Report Podcast
author: Campus Sports Network
description: This podcast will cover college athletics, but in a different way. It will cover the games, but it will also cover the fans, alumni, and campus culture that makes college sports what they are.

title: Future of Work Voices Podcast
author: Elliott Cirkovic
description:
Gen Z didn't become entitled. They became different. And most employers are still running the same playbook from 2015.
Future of Work Voices is honest, unscripted conversations with Gen Z graduates, made for the HR leads and hiring managers who need to understand them.
No career advice. No rehearsed answers. Just the real picture of who this generation is, what shaped them, and what employers are completely missing.
Hosted by Elliott Cirkovic, 5 years inside Australian early talent with 70+ employer relationships.
Follow to hear what your next hire actually thinks.

title: Tech Talks | powered by Buildable Approvals, hosted by Grant Johnsen
author: Dianne Willcock
description: In every episode, you’ll hear real stories, the latest innovations, and practical tips that are shaping the future of our industry. Whether you’re a seasoned pro, a hands-on builder, or just someone who loves seeing what’s next in construction tech, you’ll find fresh insights and inspiration here.  Tune in, get involved.

title: The Rules of Investing Podcast
author: wardlarry
description: 1. The Rules of Investing Podcast is one of Australia s longest running business podcasts, providing investors with unparalleled access to the ideas and insights of Australia s leading fund managers economists and industry experts Learn how the industry s best invest with the help of Livewire s James Marlay and Chris Conway Whether you’re new to investing or a seasoned professional this podcast is for you New episodes are released every second Friday available on Livewire Markets Spotify Apple Podcasts

title: The Pretty Savage Podcast
author: Kati Elliott
description:
Follow Kati on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/katielliottxo/
Follow Kati on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@katielliottxo

title: Electrifying Growth
author: Edison Partners
description: There are moments in a company's growth journey that are undeniably electric. We're here to celebrate those moments and the visionaries behind them. This is Electrifying Growth–an original show from Edison Partners sharing stories to spark inspiration and accelerate growth.

title: Del Be Del Podcast
author: Abbas Hooshmand
description: Del be Del (دل به دل) is a Persian expression meaning heart to heart. This podcast is an invitation to slow down and explore what it means to be human. Through intimate conversations with people from all walks of life, we explore love, loss, identity, purpose, belonging, relationships, courage, and life’s defining transitions. Together, we uncover the stories beneath the surface—one heart-to-heart conversation at a time.

title: MrBallen Strange Podcast
author: Ballen
description:
I tell strange, dark & mysterious stories.

That is all i do, delivering true, spine-chilling accounts of real-life horrors and unbelievable twists every single week.

Whether it is an invisible toxin lurking beneath the crisp sheets of a dream island resort, a shocking family betrayal behind closed doors, or a cold-blooded murderer hidden within a tight-knit circle of friends, we dive deep into unsettling cases where the danger is never where you expect it.

Subscribe and join us weekly for immersive storytelling with endings you will never see coming.

title: 12 Years Out: With Cole Puterbaugh
author: Cole Puterbaugh
description: Thinking about leaving your home country? 12 Years Out with Cole Puterbaugh explores the real cost, tradeoffs, and consequences of life abroad. With 12+ years overseas, a cross-cultural family, and PhD-level insight, Cole breaks down freedom, isolation, identity, and opportunity beyond surface-level expat stories. Each 15–30 minute episode covers relocation, cultural adaptation, global education, and high-stakes life decisions, all oriented towards helping you understand what trade-offs of living abroad.

title: Drafting the Past
author: DTP Media LLC
description: Drafting the Past is a podcast devoted to the craft of writing history. Each episode features an interview with a historian about the joys and challenges of their work as a writer.

title: Last Flight Tonight
author: Joseph Bradshaw
description: Hello, and welcome to Last Flight Tonight, your quick, clear aviation news podcast. Whether you are an aviation enthusiast who has loved aviation all your life, or just a civilian who wants to know what is going on in the aviation world, this is the podcast for you, and with no ads whatsoever, you can enjoy it without any interruptions. So let’s put those tray tables up, seats in their fully upright position, and let’s prepare for takeoff.

title: Enigma's Podcast
author: Mangu Technologies Inc.
description:
ENIGMA: Beyond the Truth explores the mysteries, investigations, true stories, and unexplained cases that continue to challenge what we think we know.

Each episode takes a cinematic deep dive into a compelling case, following the evidence, examining conflicting accounts, separating documented facts from speculation, and exploring the questions that remain unanswered.

From unsolved mysteries and extraordinary events to forgotten investigations and stories hidden in the shadows of history, ENIGMA searches for what lies beyond the obvious.

Some mysteries have answers.

Others leave clues.

Welcome to ENIGMA: Beyond the Truth.

title: Just Chilling with Jane and Nate
author: Nathan Snowden
description: Join my girlfriend Jane and I as we talk about trending topics, pop culture, and whatever is on our minds.

title: The Wolf of Ball Street
author: Robbie Goodwin
description:
The Wolf of Ball Street is an NBA comedy podcast hosted by comedians Robbie Goodwin, Keenan Womack and Miguel Silva.

Each episode breaks down the league’s biggest games, trades, rumors, meltdowns and ongoing nonsense with sharp basketball talk, reckless financial metaphors and absolutely no fiduciary responsibility. From superstar drama and front-office chaos to wildly premature rookie takes, no NBA asset is safe.

Buy the takes. Short the narratives. Follow The Wolf of Ball Street wherever you get your podcasts.

title: Beyond The Spotlight - KNTK 93.7 The Ticket
author: BDP Communications, LLC 93.7 The Ticket FM
description:
Beyond the Spotlight is where the game doesn't end when the final whistle blows. Hosted by former NWU collegiate athletes Rudy Gres IV and Gary Payton Barthelemy, we break down the biggest sports headlines, and bring you real conversations from inside the world of sports.
But we're more than highlights and box scores, we're shining a spotlight on the untold stories, unforgettable journeys, and inspiring voices that deserve to be heard. Big takes, authentic stories, and a passion for the game, this is Beyond the Spotlight.

title: Caleb's Podcast
author: Caleb
description: This is a demo podcast!

title: Bravo Bed Bugs
author: Bravo Bed Bugs
description: Grab your wine, turn on the captions, and let’s talk about the absolute chaos on our screens. Bravo Bed Bugs is your ultimate weekly breakdown of the wildest moments, biggest betrayals, and most unhinged drama in reality TV. From the explosive shouting matches on The Real Housewives and the messy dynamics of 90 Day fiancé, to the strategic backstabbing on Big Brother and The Traitors, we are dissecting every single episode. Join hosts Megan& Ash every Week]as they call out the villains, defend the underdogs, and recap the scenes you had to rewind three times. No producers, just bad takes

title: On The Move
author: Ignite The Ville
description:
Welcome to the On The Move Podcast! We're Ignite The Ville, a campus ministry at the University of Louisville, helping students find and follow Jesus.
Each week, we share biblical teaching and conversations to encourage, strengthen, and equip you in your walk with Christ. Our prayer is that every episode points you closer to Jesus and reminds you that He is still on the move.

title: ADHD And The Theory Of All The Things
author: Andrew Perry
description:
ADHD and the Theory of All the Things is a podcast born from one of the most recognizable parts of ADHD: relentless curiosity.


Hosted by Andrew Perry, each episode follows a single question down the rabbit hole to uncover the history, science, psychology, and human stories behind the ordinary things we often take for granted. From photography and clocks to coffee, sleep, Apple, money, friendship, and everything in between, you’ll discover how everyday things became extraordinary.


You don’t need to have ADHD to enjoy this podcast. You just need to love asking, “Why?” If you’ve ever lost an afternoon chasing one fascinating question after another, you’ll feel right at home.


This isn’t a lecture or a textbook. Think of it like a conversation around a campfire with a good friend, uncovering forgotten stories, and making complex topics surprisingly easy to understand.


Because every ordinary thing has an extraordinary story. And once you know it, you’ll never look at the world the same way again.

title: Living Well with Reggie and Shawna Howze
author: Reggie and Shawna Howze
description:
Living Well with Reggie & Shawna Howze is a podcast that inspires adults 50 and older to embrace
healthier, more purposeful lives through faith, wellness, love, and authentic conversations.
Join us as we share our own journey, interview inspiring guests, and explore topics like healthy aging,
marriage, nutrition, fitness, gardening, personal growth, and finding purpose in every season of life.
Whether you're starting over, overcoming challenges, or simply looking for encouragement, our message is
simple:
"It's never too late to live well."

title: Welcome to Eden with Monique Fradieu
author: Monique Fradieu
description:
Welcome to Eden is a spiritual homecoming.

Hosted by Monique Fradieu, this podcast is an invitation back to the life God designed for you from the very beginning—where identity is clear, intimacy is natural, and assignment is purposeful.


Each episode explores the foundational truths found in Genesis:
that God created you in His image,
called you into closeness with Him,
and entrusted you with a domain to steward on the earth.


If you’ve ever felt spiritually homesick, disconnected from your purpose, or unsure of who God created you to be, Welcome to Eden will guide you back to clarity. Through Scripture, reflection, and honest conversation, you’ll rediscover the beauty of God’s original design—and learn how to walk it out in your everyday life.


This is your invitation to return.
To remember.
To rebuild.
To come home.


Welcome to Eden.

title: Summer House with Sam
author: Sam Ayala
description:
Summer House with Sam is dedicated to celebrating the extraordinary stories of people from all walks of life. Join Sam Ayala as he explores the beauty of life's ordinary moments, proving that in the tapestry of humanity, every thread - celebrity or not - contributes to a larger, vibrant picture.

Everyone has an amazing story to tell, regardless of their status or background. Through candid conversations and thoughtful interviews, listeners are invited to explore the lives of guests from diverse backgrounds, discovering the triumphs, challenges, and moments of joy that define their existence.

By sharing diverse narratives, Summer House with Sam encourages listeners to appreciate the richness of the human experience and the connections that bind us all. Whether it's a tale of resilience, a quirky hobby, or a heartfelt lesson learned, each episode reminds us that every story matters, and sometimes the best thing we can do is simply listen.

title: Closer Than a Brother Podcast
author: Closer Than a Brother Podcast
description:
Closer Than a Brother is a men’s podcast about faith, friendship and the battles men often carry in silence. Through honest, unfiltered conversations, we unpack loneliness, masculinity, brotherhood, purpose, relationships, weakness, strength and life with Christ. 
Our heart is to create a space where men are challenged, encouraged and reminded that they are not alone. Real talk, real struggles and real hope, pointing men back to God, community and true brotherhood in a world that often leaves men isolated, distracted and disconnected.

title: De Paisano A Paisano
author: Erik Ledezma, Angel Hernandez, and Raul Hernandez
description:
De Paisano A Paisano is a podcast about real estate, family, culture, entrepreneurship, and the experiences that shape Latino professionals and business owners.

Hosted by Raul Hernandez, Angel Hernandez, and Eric Ledesma of Paisano Realty, the podcast features honest conversations, practical advice, and real stories from inside the real estate industry. The hosts share lessons from their own journeys, including growing up in immigrant families, building careers, raising families, navigating challenging transactions, and learning from mentors.

Each episode brings a mix of personal stories, real estate knowledge, business conversations, and guests with valuable experience in real estate, financial services, entrepreneurship, and the Latino community.

No scripts, no sugarcoating, just real conversations de paisano a paisano.

title: Behold: Good News, Great Joy
author: Hope Community Church
description:
Use this Christmas service with friends, family or as a personal devotional to celebrate and reflect.
It is intended as a guide to spark conversations, remember the Good News and move us to worship Jesus.

title: Voice Notes to Myself
author: Gabe
description: A raw, unscripted podcast about Jungian shadow work, allowing myself to be seen, and the work of becoming whole—plus whatever else is on my mind. Each episode, I pull a shadow work card and talk through what comes up, alongside hoodoo and rootwork practice, ancestral altar reflections, random musings, and the occasional weird tangent. There's no script; just my effort to show up authentically as I am and be vulnerable in the process, one voice note at a time.

title: CEOs You Should Know Powered by Thompson
author: iHeartMedia Charlotte
description:
CEOs You Should Know is a weekly iHeartMedia podcast hosted by Will Jones, CEO of Thompson (ThompsonCFF.org), that spotlights the visionary leaders driving Charlotte's growth and success.

Each episode features candid conversations with influential CEOs and business executives who are shaping the region's economy, culture, and future. Listeners gain insight into the leadership journeys, challenges, and strategies behind some of Charlotte's most respected organizations.

From innovation and entrepreneurship to community impact, CEOs You Should Know celebrates the people and ideas powering one of America's fastest-growing business communities. Tune in each week for inspiring stories and actionable leadership lessons from Charlotte's top executives.

title: Build A Better Business
author: Marty Pearson
description:
Ever feel like running a business should be easier?
Like you're constantly juggling people problems, customer demands, and a to-do list that never ends—and wondering, “Why isn’t this working better?”
Welcome to Build a Better Business—the podcast for leaders, managers, and business owners who want to lead with clarity and create workplaces that work.
Each week, leadership coach and HR Consultant Marty Pearson shares practical insights, real-life lessons, and coaching tips to help you build stronger teams, better systems, and a business people want to be part of.

title: The Living Heritage
author: Ethan miller
description: Echoes Beyond Borders explores the hidden layers of society and culture from around the world. Every episode uncovers fascinating traditions, forgotten histories, social behaviors, and cultural mysteries that shape our everyday lives. Whether it's an ancient ritual, a modern social trend, or an untold community story, this podcast brings thoughtful conversations that inspire curiosity and understanding.

title: The lost zeal
author: Lyon Portamentvibrato
description: It will be a musical as well. It’s prequel To As the being of the heart zeals a new love. It tragic romance about a boy who’s has died and how he tries to bring through musical wizardry by trying to figure out to go back through playing music.

title: USL All Access
author: United Soccer League
description: USL All-Access, hosted by USL play-by-play voice Mike Watts and lead USL analyst Devon Kerr, will give listeners a behind-the-scenes look at the United Soccer League, featuring highlights and storylines from around the USL Championship and USL League One, and more. Tune in to hear from managers, players, and league executives on the latest on kits, community initiatives, and other stories from on and off the pitch.

title: Finding Your Second Wind
author: Lewis Miccio
description:
Stories beyond the highlight reel.

Gaining insight into the struggles that athlete's face and how they overcome them.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

title: Spartan Rises Podcast
author: The Common Man OCR
description:
Conquer the course. Conquer your mind. Rise Together. 
Every obstacle reflects the unseen battles we face in real life. Welcome to Spartan Rises Podcast, hosted by fellow OCR racers Ken and Dave. We strip away the armor to dive into the ultimate trifecta: Mental, Physical, and Spiritual Health.
We’re opening up about our burnouts, breakthroughs, and triumphs—sharing how lessons forged in the mud apply to everyday life. Whether you’re an 18-year-old rookie or an 80-year-old chasing a Trifecta, this is your starting line.
Hit Follow and let’s rise together!

title: Channel 2.0 Podcast
author: Kameron Olsen
description: Welcome to the Channel 2.0 Podcast, where we explore the modern technology distribution model and the trends shaping the channel ecosystem. Hosted by Kameron Olsen, each episode features dynamic conversations with industry leaders, sharing actionable insights, success stories, and strategies for growth. Whether you’re a supplier, TSD, MSP, or Trusted Advisor, this podcast offers the tools and inspiration to thrive in the ever-evolving channel landscape. Tune in to elevate your business and lead the way in Channel 2.0.

title: The GK Subplot
author: Gautamkrishna
description: Everyone sees the main plot. The GK Subplot explains the real reason behind the things people care about - money, culture, power, sport, luxury, business, trends, status, and human behaviour. Smart, conversational breakdowns of the story behind the story.

title: well yes but actually no
author: katja černe
description: A podcast about perspective shifts. A variety of topics. Check out some episodes to get the feel of it.

title: Not Everyone's Cup of Tea
author: Not Everyone's Cup of Tea
description:
Welcome to Not Everyone’s Cup of Tea—where the tea is strong, the conversations are unfiltered, and nothing is off limits.
We’re CoCo & Jenn, and we don’t do fake, polished, or sugar-coated. We pour the tea the same way we live life—raw, loud, honest, and just a little unhinged.
One episode will have you laughing until your face hurts. The next might hit you right in the chest. We sit down with bikers, bartenders, business owners, musicians, first responders, and anyone with a story worth telling. If you’ve lived a little, been through some shit, and aren’t afraid to keep it real… you’ll fit

title: The Journey Of a Thousand Miles
author: blessed mollaries
description: The Journey of a Thousand Miles is a podcast about growth, resilience, and the courage to take the first step toward a meaningful life. Every great achievement begins with a single decision, and every success story is built through persistence, learning, and determination.In each episode, we explore inspiring stories, practical life lessons, personal development strategies, leadership, purpose, entrepreneurship, faith, and the mindset needed to overcome obstacles. Whether you're starting a new career, building a business, pursuing your dreams, or navigating life's challenges, this podcast will encourage you to keep moving forward—even when the destination seems far away.Join us as we discover that success is not about how quickly you arrive, but about who you become along the journey. Because every mile matters, every lesson counts, and every step brings you closer to your purpose.Take the first step. Embrace the journey. Transform your life—one mile at a time.

title: The Mustang Journey
author: Horse Radio Network
description: The Mustang Journey tells stories that inspire action—whether that's adopting a mustang, attending the Wild Mustang & Burro Finals, becoming a sponsor, making a donation, or joining the community that helps keep these horses in loving homes. Every episode is designed to grow awareness, build connection, and create the support needed to ensure a bright future for America's wild horses and burros. Brought to you by the Mustang Heritage Foundation.

title: Inner Light Alignment
author: Brice Guiho
description:
Conversations with real people who did the inner work and came out different.

Not motivational speeches. Not advice. Just honest, unfiltered stories about the moment someone decided to stop shrinking, stop carrying weight that wasn't theirs, and finally choose themselves.

Each guest comes with a story. They leave having said things out loud they've never said before.

If you've ever felt stuck in a version of yourself you've outgrown, this is for you.

Hosted by Brice, spiritual life coach and intuitive creator.

title: Voices with Andreanet
author: Andreanet
description:
Voices with AndreaNet is a bilingual rock and heavy metal podcast where the stories behind the music come to life.
Hosted by AndreaNet, a female voice in the rock and metal community, this podcast brings honest conversations with the musicians, vocalists, photographers, journalists, producers, and creative minds who help shape the world of heavy music.
From the stage to the backstage, we talk about the journeys behind the songs: the passion, challenges, dreams, struggles, career paths, and unforgettable moments that make this community so powerful.
Connecting voices from Latin America, the United States, and the global metal scene, Voices with Andrea Net celebrates the people who create, support, and live for rock and heavy metal.
Subscribe and discover the stories behind the sound.

title: All Things Stoic
author: Stories Of Our Past d/b/a All Things Stoic
description: Let me not inundate you with Stoicism generic form. Let me riddle you with deep thought. Merged and blended with stories of old, such as Hercules, or the Trojan women. Let us say that this podcast will be like no other. It is short, to the point, and immersed with waves that you feel when under water. Madness may come to you as well. But upon such a madness, what blooms is a form of genius. A spark. Creativity. This is the stoic form, the Roman way.

title: Power Shot
author: Your daily dose of power
description:
Power Shot is the daily reality check for the man who demands self-mastery and radical responsibility. We don’t do "fluff" and we don’t do comfort. We are here to execute.
Every episode delivers a concentrated strike of steel-clad psychology designed to shatter your excuses and rewire your will. This is tactical audio for those who have traded victimhood for victory. If you’re looking for a participation trophy, keep scrolling. If you’re ready to weaponize your mindset and dominate your day, you’re in the right place.

title: Glass Ceiling, Smashed
author: Lauren Erbicella
description:
Glass Ceiling, Smashed discusses business, communication, leadership, and corporate life topics targeted to (though not specific to!) women wanting to climb the corporate ladder, improve their work/life balance, and become successful and respected leaders in their field. 


Designed to educate and elevate, Glass Ceiling, Smashed puts a blunt, yet informational and supportive spin on all topics related to professional life.


If you're a woman (or any other gender!) who wants to be respected, carry yourself with confidence, and lead yourself and others toward a more fulfilling life, you've found the place for you. 


Everyone is welcome here, so let's go smash that glass ceiling together.

title: After Office Hours
author: Shaun Eide & Hayden Garrick
description: The workday is over, but the conversation is just getting started. After Office Hours brings together a professor and former student, now a business practitioner, to explore business, technology, pop culture, and the hobbies we love through the lenses of both theory and real-world experience. Smart insights, spirited debates, and fun conversations—after office hours.

title: She’s a Whole Vibe
author: Domonice Queen
description: Navigating Grief, love, life, Family and starting over

title: Family Office Technology Hub
author: FOTechHub
description: Welcome to the FOTechHub Podcast, a resource for all things tech and operations within the realm of family offices. Join us as we delve into the intricate world of technological advancements tailored specifically for Single Family Office and Multi-Family Office Personnel.

title: The BroPak BluePrint
author: Ben Figueroa
description: The BroPak Blueprint is a podcast about purpose, narrative, and scale. Hosted by Benjamin Figueroa Medina, each episode features honest conversations with entrepreneurs, nonprofit leaders, creatives, advocates, and community builders. Guests share the experiences, challenges, and strategies behind their work, including how they found their voice, built their organizations, overcame setbacks, and created a blueprint for sustainable growth and lasting impact.

title: The Right Roads
author: Robert Mikulec
description: If you're a Christian conservative looking to better understand and live in our crazy world, you've come to the right place.  We won't be afraid to talk about culture, religion, or politics — along with over 20 other topics, all "evergreen" and helpful to living an abundant life in a better America.

title: Hot Wired - From the bottom of the ladder up
author: Namche Base
description:
A young IBEW electrician talks you through the wildest job in America right now, wiring the data centers that run the AI age, while figuring out his own life one paycheck, one panel, and one new town at a time.
 
Part ride-along, part coming-of-age, part the best argument for the trades you’ll ever hear, from a guy who still can’t believe he gets paid for this. Hosted by Connor Walsh.
 
New episodes weekly. Bring your own coffee

Nobody told Connor Walsh the door was there.
 
Three semesters into a community college degree he hated, broke and going nowhere, he stumbled into an electrical apprenticeship almost by accident. Two weeks in, he knew. Four years later, he’s a fourth-year IBEW apprentice wiring hyperscale data centers on the biggest construction buildout since the Interstate Highway System, making more than his college friends, with a pension they don’t understand yet, having the time of his life.
 
Hot Wired is his show. Every week, Connor brings you onto the job, what a data center actually is from the electrician’s seat, what an apprentice really makes, why a beautiful conduit run makes grown men stop and stare, and tells you his own story along the way. The highs, the road, the journeymen who chew him out and teach him everything, and the gas station breakfasts he rates on a scale nobody asked for.
 
It’s high-energy, it’s funny, and underneath the fun it’s making a quiet case: the trades might be the best-kept secret in America, and Connor’s a little mad nobody told him sooner.
 
Hot Wired is powered by Namche Base, workforce villages built for the people who build America’s digital future. Learn more at NamcheBase.com.

title: LeaderSIP: Let's Talk Leadership
author: Shannon Jakes
description:
LeaderSIP is a podcast about leadership, life, and whatever is in our cups! Hosted by Dr. Shannon Jakes and Dr. Yara Cruz. In each episode, we pull up a chair, a bevy, and dig into the questions leaders actually wrestle with: how we handle change, how we show up under pressure, and what it takes to lead in a way that's both effective and genuinely human.


Drawing on research, lived experience, and candid conversations with guests from around the globe, we move past the polished LinkedIn version of leadership to talk about what really goes on underneath the surface including the doubt, the growth, the emotional work nobody puts on the org chart. Whether you're leading a team, a company, or just yourself, pull up a seat. Let's talk leadership.

title: Inside Value Investing
author: Hotchkis & Wiley
description: Inside Value Investing, a Hotchkis & Wiley podcast, offers thoughtful perspectives on markets, valuation, and the discipline of value investing. Grounded in Hotchkis & Wiley’s bottom-up, fundamental research approach, the podcast features insights from our experienced investment professionals. Each episode explores market trends, portfolio themes, and the research process behind identifying undervalued securities across the market-cap spectrum and high yield credit.

title: The Competition Floor - Talking with Thomas
author: Thomas Higgs (Training with Thomas)
description: You probably played a sport... football, rugby, athletics... but that was a long time ago. You may have stayed in fitness, or you might have fallen off completely. This podcast is for you. To help you find that very same passion for sports again. To help you realise it is not too late to start again, to be sporty, to achieve some great things! We talk about the how's the what's the whys, and to inspire you to chase your athletic dreams again!

title: The Flourish Foundry Podcast
author: Abigail Johansson | Women Entrepreneurship Advocate
description:
A podcast where women in business share their journeys, celebrating entrepreneurship, creativity, and resilience. Hosted by a passionate web designer and entrepreneur, this show connects like-minded women to inspire, collaborate, and grow together.


Each episode dives into the stories behind successful businesses, highlighting the challenges, triumphs, and strategies that empower women to thrive.


Whether you're an aspiring entrepreneur, a seasoned business owner, or simply curious about the paths to success, this podcast fosters community and meaningful conversations with extraordinary women who are shaping their industries.


🫶🏻 Stay updated with all things Flourish Foundry:

author: RaikenTB
description: Chris and Nathan are two old men who talk about video games through their 30+ years of experience with the hobby and how it continues today. New episodes every Monday.

title: Still Drying. A Lorcana Podcast.
author: Still Drying
description: Welcome Illumineers! This is Still Drying with Jeff and Erika.  A one stop podcast to laugh, learn, and love this great game, Lorcana.  We will dive into the inkwell and pull out the latest news, tactics, and overall beauty of this game.  Will you join us on this epic adventure through the wonderful world of Lorcana?

title: WHAT DO YOU WANNA TALK ABOUT¿
author: Bradley Sithole
description: we just talk on whats going on guys come on

title: She Changed Her Mind
author: Emma Jones
description:
You've built your whole life by someone else's blueprint: the training, the schedule, the version of success you were handed before you ever got to choose it. What if you could redesign it, on purpose, starting now?


She Changed Her Mind is for the physician and high-achieving professional who did everything right and still feels stuck. Each week, we bring design thinking (the same rigor you'd apply to any hard problem) to the parts of life that feel unsolvable: burnout, identity, ambition, the quiet sense that something needs to shift. You'll learn to build your own Life by Design Blueprint, a living draft you get to keep revising as you change, instead of a fixed plan you're failing to follow.

This isn't about forcing yourself into a better mood or grinding harder toward someone else's finish line. It's about capacity: building the internal steadiness to notice what you actually want, and the practical skill of acting on it. Expect real tools, honest conversation, and permission to treat your own life as a work in progress worth designing well.


Hosted by Dr. Emma Jones, a pediatric palliative care physician and burnout coach who's done this redesign in her own life and now guides other high-achieving women through it.

title: BreathWoven
author: Crystal
description:
Welcome to BreathWoven,
You've done the work. Now what?
BreathWoven is Soul Remembrance, Lightbody calibration, and New Earth integration for those already past the awakening and standing at the threshold of what comes next.
Not shadow work. Not another meditation loop. Guided recalibration for where you actually are.
Every transmission meets you at that threshold and walks with you home.
Crystal
breathwoven.com

title: Meirz Cloud Weekly
author: Meir Gabay
description: Meirz Cloud Weekly is an independent weekly podcast with commentary on public Amazon Web Services announcements. It is not affiliated with, sponsored by, or endorsed by Amazon Web Services.

title: Hotline to the past
author: Katische Dionne Haberfield
description:
A friend from a past life is calling to say hello! 

Will you answer the call?☎️ 


Join Katische for a fun and light-hearted session where she channels a past life 

friend of yours who has a positive message to bring through.


10 minutes channeling time. Join us for the fun, or apply to become a guest.


Katische Haberfield is a direct transmission spiritual channel and a past life medium. She was formerly a Past Life Regression Therapist and hopes to bring joy to the world through these connections.


Become a guest and receive your own past life channeling. $111 AUD

Book at Katische.com


Spiritual direction or guidance is not psychological counselling or crisis therapy.

Insights are for "personal reflection purposes only" and do not constitute legal, medical, or financial advice.


Katische is a member of the International Institute for Complementary Therapist.

title: The Broken Gavel
author: The Broken Gavel
description: The Broken Gavel’s Podcast is where legal truth meets lived experience. Hosted by Dashawn Mayweather, this podcast unpacks real-life stories of justice, betrayal, and resilience, beginning with her own battle to hold a negligent attorney accountable. Each episode explores what happens after the verdict, offering raw storytelling, reflection, and real conversations about the emotional toll of legal warfare. From courtroom battles to personal healing, Dashawn shares the journey of reclaiming your voice, understanding your rights, and rising in the aftermath of a system that failed you.

title: Naserian Rises
author: Naserian Axis
description: Real talk for African, immigrant, and diaspora women building while raising, mothering, and holding it all. Nobody warns you what it actually costs to build a business, a career, or a movement while you're also raising children, and carrying a whole family's expectations on your back. Naserian Rises is the conversation we wish someone had handed us years ago. Hosted by Iman R. Hatibu, with Jamila Lugembe — co-founders of Naserian Axis Consulting, an African women-led advisory firm, this podcast pulls up a seat for African, immigrant, and diaspora women building in the U.S. and beyond.  Every episode brings in real voices: partners, practitioners, guests from every corner of world. This isn't a lecture. It's a table. Pull up. New episodes soon. Come as you are.

title: Longevity University: Health, Peptides & Optimzation
author: XYRx
description: Physician Dr. Rehan Muttalib and XYRx founder Milan Costich on the real science of male longevity: peptides, GLP-1s, training, and recovery.

title: User friendly
author: Deloitte
description: Want to stay plugged in to the biggest trends in technology, media, and telecom? Our TMT podcast series takes what you need to know and breaks it down into something more User Friendly. From social responsibility to the next emerging technologies, industry leaders join us to dive into the biggest topics shaping your business—and the world around you.

title: RavynReads

title: The Grimwood Hunters
author: Speculative Entertainment
description:
The Grimwood Hunters is a comedy-horror audio drama following a mismatched team of monster hunters as they battle cryptids, ghosts, demons, and things far worse lurking around the town of Grimwood. Armed with questionable plans, dysfunctional teamwork, and an alarming lack of common sense, the Hunters somehow manage to save the day—usually by accident. Blending supernatural adventure, sharp humor, and unforgettable characters, The Grimwood Hunters delivers laughs, scares, and chaos in equal measure. is is my very interesting podcast

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.
