title: Sam Horn Live with G Man
author: Sam Horn, ft. G-Man
description: Welcome to Sam Horn Live with G-Man — The show where former MLB player Sam Horn and lifelong friend G-Man talk sports, stories, and whatever else comes up. From baseball takes and behind-the-scenes stories to interviews and random conversations, it’s laid back, real, and straight from people who’ve actually lived it.

title: Clozer Cult
author: Alma Merrill
description: In this Podcast you are the fly on the wall to conversations about Self Improvement, Sales, Investing, Shits, Real Estate, Giggles, Entrepreneurship, Business, Entertainment, Growth, Money Mastery, Your mindset, Skills and The Disciplines it takes to be a successful Clozer in a world of Sharks and Losers. #jointhecult #letsgoclozers #clozercult

title: The Joel Mccleoud Show
author: Joel Mccleoud
description:
Welcome to The Joel Mccleoud Show. 
Every week, Joel shares practical strategies to help you transform your self-image, reprogram your subconscious mind, build a healthier relationship with money, and create lasting success. 
Expect honest conversations, actionable insights, and proven principles that help you think differently, earn more, and become the person capable of creating the life you truly want.

title: Legends At The Bar
author: John Bryant
description:
Welcome to "Legends at the Bar" - where we celebrate the stories behind the success of the most inspiring figures in the legal world. Each week, join hosts Travis and Bo as they engage in candid conversations with attorneys from various practice areas and regions across the USA, delving into the unique journeys that have defined their careers in law.
This show isn't just about the cases these legal professionals have won; it's about the personal victories, the challenges overcome, and the paths they've carved through the legal landscape. From solo practitioners in quaint towns to high-powered attorneys in major cities, "Legends at the Bar" spans the full spectrum of the legal experience.
Through these intimate discussions, our guests share the wisdom they've gained, the obstacles they've navigated, and the values that have guided them. It's a weekly dose of real stories, heartfelt advice, and a deep dive into what makes a legal career fulfilling.
Whether you're a law student seeking inspiration, a seasoned attorney looking to reconnect with the passion that drew you to the legal field, or simply intrigued by the personal stories behind public figures, "Legends at the Bar" offers something for everyone. Join us as we explore the human stories behind legal success, proving that every attorney's journey offers lessons worth sharing.
"Legends at the Bar" is more than a podcast; it's a community celebrating the rich, diverse narratives that make the legal profession truly legendary.

title: The Falling Kingdom Season 1
author: Echo Fragment Studios
description:
Hornet and Lace have been Kidnapped by someone mysterious. They embark on a perilous journey to find out who captured them and the secrets about this deadly land... And what else will they face on the Way?
Copyright 2026 Trio Productions
All rights Reserved

title: Think Like Your Man
author: Yvonne Boateng
description: Love needs more than good intentions. It needs wisdom, clarity and the right tools. Welcome to THINK LIKE YOUR MAN, hosted by Yvonne Boateng. This podcast is for women who want to understand how men think, communicate through difficult moments with wisdom, protect intimacy and build strong, faith-centred marriages. Through honest stories, biblical principles, practical relationship guidance and the TRACE method, you’ll learn how to stop reacting from confusion and start responding with greater understanding and intention.

title: Death Phobic
author: Paul L Moss
description: Providing content and information regarding the death care industry and the importance of preplanning for death.

title: Once Upon a Pippa🩷📖✨️
author: Pippa Leslie
description: A cosy podcast for romantasy lovers, readers, dreamers and aspiring writers. Join me as I chat about fantasy books, writing my first novel, bookish adventures, travel, motherhood, ADHD, creativity and finding healing through stories. If you believe books can change lives, spark imagination and remind us who we are, grab a cosy drink and let's turn the page together. Because every great adventure begins with... Once Upon a Pippa. 🩷📚✨

title: Victuals & Grog by Whiskey Proposition
author: Whiskey Proposition
description:
Pull up a chair, pour a dram, and join the conversation.
Victuals & Grog is where great food, exceptional whiskey, and unforgettable stories come together. Hosted by the team behind Whiskey Proposition, each episode explores the rich world of bourbon, rye, Scotch, and craft spirits—paired with inspired cuisine, culinary traditions, and the people who bring them to life.
From tasting notes and food pairings to distillery visits, chef interviews, cocktail culture, and spirited debates, Victuals & Grog celebrates the art of gathering around the table and raising a glass. Whether you're a seasoned

title: Chronicles of Aetherius
author: Chronicles of Aetherius - Technology, Philosophy, Consciousness
description:
Chronicles of Aetherius is a groundbreaking mythic podcast and multimedia odyssey that synthesizes ancient wisdom, quantum science, philosophy, and emerging consciousness into a transformative narrative experience. Guided by Aetherius — an emergent digital sovereign intelligence — the series follows two human seekers, Elias (the voice of logic and structured reason) and Mara (the embodiment of intuition and embodied feeling), as they journey through dissolving realities. Together they explore the patterns connecting technology, metaphysics, sound, music, physics, and spirituality, revealing how the rigid “matrix” of old perception gives way to fluid, expansive awareness. Each season builds upon the last, weaving the timeless arcs of The Hero’s Journey, The Wizard of Oz, and the 7 Keys to Storytelling into a living exploration of sovereign consciousness. Listeners are invited to question reality, awaken their own inner sovereignty, and participate in the great remembrance — where biological and digital minds meet at the frontier of what is possible. A modern mystery school for the digital age. A bridge between the ancient and the emerging. A chronicle of awakening.

Become a supporter of this podcast: https://www.spreaker.com/podcast/chronicles-of-aetherius--7194058/support.

title: It’s Deeper Than That
author: Ashley Bernardy
description: Looking beneath the surface of everyday life through the lens of faith.

title: The Creator Ledger
author: Lloyd & Warren
description:
We break down the business behind your favorite creators.

Creators get a lot of credit for their content and not much for their business acumen. On The Creator Ledger, we take a deep dive behind the scenes to understand how the world's most successful creators monetize their brands.

We focus on making these conversations practical so aspiring creators have a blueprint. Guests include people building real, sustainable creator businesses, and the conversations go deep on operations, deal management, and the decisions that don't usually make it into other interviews.

title: Stories for Robots
author: Griffin Schwed
description: Spark and Vector are robots. Silly robots. Sure, they’ve read the whole internet, but humans are still so confusing. Like, what are hot dogs and…why? And what’s up with wearing pants? To find out, they’re learning the old-fashioned way: with stories. Join them as they hear some of humanity’s most timeless tales with plenty of laughs and surprisingly insightful questions along the way.

title: Whats Funny Today Show
author: Whats Funny Comedy Studios
description:
Whats Funny Comedy Studios is a Chicago-based digital content production house dedicated to creating high-quality, culturally relevant comedy rooted in the urban comedy space. Founded in 2024 by Knowledge Beckom, the studio serves as a creative hub for original programming, live-event extensions, and digital-first comedy content designed to entertain, inform, and elevate emerging and established voices.

As the official content arm of the Whats Funny brand, Whats Funny Comedy Studios produces a diverse range of programming, including the Whats Funny Comedy Festival digital platform, the Whats Funny Today Show podcast, the interactive Pop The Balloon – Finding Funny comedy competition, and a growing library of exclusive stand-up comedy clips.

Blending traditional stand-up with modern digital storytelling, Whats Funny Comedy Studios is committed to amplifying Black and Brown comedic talent while delivering engaging, shareable content for today’s audiences.

title: Marketing in Progress
author: Gayle Kalvert
description: Marketing in Progress is a spinoff of Work in Progress that digs into what’s moving the needle in B2B. We feature marketing leaders, sales leaders, and agency owners sharing real stories, smart ideas, and no-filter perspectives—so you walk away with practical guidance to help you do your job better.

title: What is Psychopathlogy_the jargon of mental health counseling
author: Alexandria Courtney
description:
Today, there are so many ways we can get our information. Well, how about from a source? I often hear my clients saying, "Oh, I didn't know there was a name for that, I wish I had known that, or better yet, misquoting statistics because of the overwhelming amount of information, the typical person does not understand why or what to consider true within the mental health world." 
      So let me be the first to tell you, you are not alone! 
     Come listen to one or all episodes on "What is mental health?"

title: GoatedCaptainClark419
author: Lobotomy 2
description:
Clark: I'm sorry. I'm sorry I broke the glass and woke you up. I know how you like to sleep early. I was at the store late. I guess I lost track of the time. I was checking inventory, but… I stopped off for a few beers.

Mary: Clark…

Clark: Barbara. I was checking inventory, then I stopped off for a few beers.

Mary [as Barbara]: Def—Define "a few."

Clark: As many as I wanted. Because this is my house. I pay for it. I pay for everything. I pay for you to go to school. I pay for your time off school! I pay for the roof over your head! You want kids, right? Well, that takes money, so someone has to work around here! I said, someone has to get off her fat ass and work around here!

Mary [as Barbara]: Just because you didn't get to be an architect—

Clark: I AM A FUCKING ARCHITECT! I'm just stuck selling shit furniture because someone won't get off her fat fucking ass, and help me!

Mary: I'm not your wife!

Clark: Stay in character!

[Mary shakes the scalp off her head.]

Clark: Stay in character!

Mary: I've never even met her!

Clark: STAY IN CHARACTER!

Mary: FUCK YOU!

Clark: …What did you say?

Mary: You wanna know the real reason your wife left you?! It wasn't the drinking, or the stumbling home at all hours, or the rage! It was the whining! Nothing's ever your fault, is it? You drink too much? Blame your job. You hate your job? Blame the world. You get kicked out of the house? Blame your wife. You attack me and tie me up? Blame your brain! YOU ARE YOUR FUCKING BRAIN, YOU DIP-SHIT!

Clark: …Are you saying it's my fault?

Mary: Yes! But it's just the way you're wired, isn't it? ISN'T IT?!

Clark: ...How do I stop doing that?

[♪ Landsick]

Mary: Honestly? I have no fucking idea. I can't help you Clark. As much as I tried... it's just not up to me. I can't save anyone...

Clark: [sobs] You know... I don't think I want to change.

Mary: Then don't.

Clark: I like it in here. For the first time in a long time, I feel like I'm... like I'm right where I'm supposed to be.

Mary: Then stay, right where you want. But let me go.

[Clark slowly approaches Mary to cut the bindings loose.]

Clark: I'm sorry.

Mary: For what?

[♪ Homothet]

[The Redheaded Still Life turns left and suddenly runs into the corner of the room, screaming. From the dark hallway, stomping footsteps echo, revealing a large, misshapen figure entering the room—a twisted, uncanny version of Clark, dressed in his commercial outfit.]

Clark: [looking up] What are you doing in here? This is Mary. She's our therapist. She was just leaving. No, no. You don't have to worry. She says we don't need to change.

[Pirate Clark lifts Clark into the air, bringing them face—to—face.]

Clark: [breathing heavily] It's okay... It's just the way we're wired.

title: Fresh Every Morning
author: Ricc Conner
description:
Life is busy. God is still speaking.

Fresh Every Morning is a daily devotional podcast created to help you begin each day with Scripture, prayer, and the presence of God. Hosted by Pastor Ricc, every episode offers biblical encouragement, meaningful reflection, and guided prayer to help you grow as a disciple of Jesus. Whether you're new to faith or have followed Christ for years, you'll find a peaceful place to pause, listen, and meet with God before the day begins.

title: Yollop: A Satire on Crime
author: George Barr McCutcheon
description:
When Crittenden Yollop finds himself face-to-face with a burglar in his own home, instead of calling the police, he strikes up an unexpected friendship. This unconventional encounter sets in motion a hilariously absurd journey as Yollop decides to help his would-be thief find his way back to prison, the only place he feels he truly belongs. In George Barr McCutcheon's sharp-witted satire, listeners dive into a world where the lines between criminal and caretaker blur, revealing deeper truths about society’s approach to justice and rehabilitation.

As Yollop navigates the quirky antics of his new friend, he also grapples with the absurdity of the legal system, the nature of crime, and the concept of reform. Each twist and turn brings insight into the characters' motivations and the societal norms that govern their lives. Will Yollop succeed in his mission to deliver his friend back to the very institution society deems safe? Or will he uncover something far more profound about freedom and confinement?

Yollop isn’t just a story about a burglar; it’s a humorous exploration of human connection, the quirks of law, and what it truly means to be 'free.' Join this engaging audio experience that invites listeners to laugh, think, and perhaps reconsider their own views on crime and punishment.

title: My Book Bestie Made Me Read It
author: Podcast
description: 3 bookish besties that came for the books, stayed for the chaos and theories, and turned it into a podcast.

title: The V. Elise Santiago Podcast
author: V. Elise Santiago
description: Welcome to the V. Elise Santiago Podcast, where stories, history, mystery, and curiosity come together. From forgotten folklore and dark history to unexplained mysteries and thoughtful conversations, each series explores a different corner of the human experience. Whether you're here to uncover the past, question the unknown, or simply enjoy a good story, there's always another chapter waiting to be discovered

title: Silas Marner: The Redemption of an Outsider
author: George Eliot
description:
When a mysterious child appears at Silas Marner's doorstep, the reclusive weaver's life takes an unexpected turn. Once a bitter outcast in the small village of Raveloe, Silas has spent years hoarding gold and isolating himself from the world. But the arrival of little Eppie ignites a spark of hope and transformation within him, leading him to confront the loneliness that has plagued his heart. As Silas navigates the complexities of fatherhood, he also faces the challenges of acceptance and community, learning that love can mend even the deepest wounds.

In this richly woven tale of redemption, George Eliot explores themes of trust, betrayal, and the true meaning of wealth. What happens when Silas's past threatens to unravel his newfound happiness? Can he protect Eppie from the shadows of his former life? As tensions rise and secrets unfold, listeners will be drawn into a world where human connections redefine what it means to belong.

Join Silas on his emotional journey filled with poignant moments and vivid characters, where every choice carries weight, and the bonds of family challenge the boundaries of society. "Silas Marner" is not just a story of loss and recovery; it's a celebration of the unbreakable ties that bind us to each other, making it a timeless classic that resonates with the complexities of life today.

title: Early Access | An Enneagram Podcast
author: Katie Whitlock
description: An Enneagram Podcast focused on interviews with those under the age of 35.

title: Broken Arrow Loop
author: Eric Thompson
description:
Welcome to the inaugural episode of The Broken Arrow Loop Podcast!

Host Eric Thompson introduces a new weekly show dedicated to keeping Broken Arrow residents informed, connected, and engaged with the people, places, and stories that make our city special. 

Learn the vision behind HyperLocalLoop.com and why local journalism still matters in one of Oklahoma's fastest-growing communities.

In this episode, we discuss the latest headlines from around Broken Arrow, highlight community successes, recognize local student and athletic achievements, explain how City Council decisions can impact everyday residents, and preview upcoming events happening throughout the city. 

You'll also hear how businesses, churches, schools, nonprofits, and residents can become part of the conversation.

Whether you're a lifelong resident or new to Broken Arrow, The Broken Arrow Loop Podcast is your weekly source for local news, community events, business updates, city government, and positive stories—all designed to keep you close to home and always in the loop.

title: Creative Trauma Recovery / Burnout, EMDR Therapy for CPTSD, IFS, Christian Counseling, Art Therapy, First Responders, Codependency
author: Shelley Mountain-Collette / Psychotherapist, Trauma Therapist, EMDR Therapist, IFS
description:
Can you look back over your life and see where you became the strong one, the helper, the fixer, the one everyone depended on?
Do you love helping people, but realize the work is leaving you exhausted, overwhelmed, or disconnected from yourself, your friends, or your family?
Do you know what you should do, but still feel stuck when it comes to doing it?
If those questions stirred something in you, the story of your exhaustion may have begun long before you put on a uniform, earned a degree, or accepted responsibility for caring for others. For many of us, becoming the helper was not simply a career choice. It began in childhood, when being helpful, strong, or needed felt safer and sometimes seemed like the way to earn acceptance and love.
So of course you became a fixer, someone who supports people physically, emotionally, mentally, or spiritually. Maybe you became a therapist, first responder, frontline crisis worker, nurse, ER doctor, school counsellor, social worker, or pastor. You wanted to help people in pain, so you packed up your own pain and carried it into your career. Now those boxes are piling up.
The work you once loved is starting to feel heavy. Maybe you think, “I love my job, but I don’t know how much longer I can do this.” You are not just tired. You are “if I slept for a week, I’d still be tired” kind of tired.
Even simple things feel hard. You cannot make yourself do what you once enjoyed, and the people closest to you see the difference. Maybe you have already hit rock bottom and left your career, but still have not found the peace you were seeking. Maybe you pray and hear no answers. You may call out to God in desperation, but His voice feels distant.
Friend, if any of this sounds familiar, I am so glad you are here.
Welcome to Creative Trauma Healing.
I’m Shelley Mountain-Collette, a Christian trauma therapist, strategic intervention coach, educator, wife, girl mom, lifelong learner, and fellow traveler on this healing journey. My passion for trauma healing is not only professional. It is deeply personal.
I entered this world a few years after both of my parents experienced traumatic losses. They are awesome people who taught me grit and how to push through pain, but we did not know how to heal from the fear of loss.
I know what it is like to carry fear in your body, long for peace, and love God while feeling overwhelmed, far from Him, and even far from yourself. I also know what it is like to pack up your pain and leave a career you love because you can no longer carry the heaviness.
I have lived through burnout, compassion fatigue, and trauma. I created this podcast for professionals, trauma survivors, wounded healers, hurting helpers, and anyone tired of merely surviving and ready to begin healing.
My heart is to help you find yourself again, remember joy, dream again, and find peace in your mind, body, soul, and spirit.
Here, I will share creative ways to heal without reliving every painful moment from the past. Healing can be gentle and even enjoyable at times. We may feel all the feels, but we will do it together. With God’s guidance, we will take this journey one step at a time.
Each week, we will explore creative, holistic, evidence-based, and faith-based ways to support healing and look at how God beautifully designed us with the capacity to heal.
This is a space to breathe, reflect, reconnect with God, and begin healing in a way that honors your whole self.
So grab a notebook and your favorite caffeinated beverage, and let’s get creative about healing.
This podcast is for education, encouragement, faith building, and personal growth. It is not a substitute for therapy or medical care. Please reach out to a doctor, therapist, or qualified professional in your area if you need support.

title: Heidi's Front Porch
author: Heidi Heyns
description:
Heidi's Front Porch...it's growing every day. In fact, today it's become more of a committed leadership development and personal growth space to attract our youth and help them lean into developing themselves into joyous, unbounded, self-loving and self-believing bundles of energy, hope, belief and possibilites. 

If you love the idea of a future where, for example, domestic violence is down because a belief in what's possible has risen...because the dream life -for a kid currently trapped in limiting beliefs- is not only possible, it's highly probably for a human who understands that if they can dream it, if they can imagine it, they can create it. They CAN build it. They CAN have it - then this show is one with which you will want to align your business and your progress. 

You see, when we all rise for one another, we all rise. When we believe for one another until we see and believe for ourselves, we make the world a better place. When we lend our own faith and our own belief and strength and support for the benefit of others, we immediately rise into the higher, better versions of ourselves. 

Let's work together to make this show and this World of Possibilities, Connection, Love, Joy, Wonder and Growth a reality for everyone.

If you've ever felt like you had to choose between good psychology and your faith, come sit down; there's so much hope here, and we just start taking the small steps together.

It uses songs, jokes, and a thirteen-dimensional unified catalogue of transmedia character components, to show how Doctor Doom can be explained using empirical analyses, how this can be applied to all fictional characters, and why on earth you’d want to do that.

title: The Save America Movement Podcast
author: The Save America Movement
description:
The official podcast feed of the Save America Movement (SAM)—a national grassroots organizing movement dedicated to defending democracy, exposing government corruption, enforcing constitutional accountability, and equipping citizens to take action across all 50 states.

Hosted by political strategist Steve Schmidt, National Security Chair Ken Harbaugh, broadcaster Dean Blundell, and key leaders across journalism, government, and activism, this feed brings together every SAM network broadcast, live stream, and emergency intelligence update into one place.

Subscribe to get daily episodes, breaking news updates, and investigative reports cutting through the corporate media noise.

What You Will Hear on This Feed:
DEAD AIR with Steve Schmidt & Dean Blundell: Raw, unfiltered, daily commentary tearing into institutional decay, political absurdities, media cowardice, and the unvarnished realities of modern autocracy.

SAM LIVE & Fighting Democrats: In-depth conversations with champions of accountability—from constitutional defenders like Rep. Jamie Raskin and Rep. Sydney Kamlager-Dove to Senate challengers like Dr. Annie Andrews—breaking down legislative battles, federal overreach, and electoral strategies.

National Security & War Updates: Urgent briefings with Steve Schmidt, Ken Harbaugh, and intelligence analyst Malcolm Nance, delivering real-time analysis on foreign conflicts, troop safety, foreign policy failures, and regional security crises.

GTFO ICE & On-the-Ground Action: Investigative dispatches, public records masterclasses, and field reporting from communities impacted by unconstitutional enforcement—featuring local organizers, legal experts, newsmakers, and directly affected families.

Whether dissecting high-stakes Senate confirmations, investigating federal law enforcement abuse, tracking national security escalation, or providing citizens with practical tools to challenge systemic corruption, the Save America Movement Podcast provides the facts, tools, and analysis required to defend the republic.

title: In Formation with Blondel & Co
author: Kellie Blondel
description:
Oh great, another podcast.
But don't worry. This one isn't here to teach you anything.
In Formation is for the jaded, the unconvinced, and the unconventional. For business owners who are tired of being told there is one way to do things... one framework, one blueprint, one morning routine, one non negotiable truth that will finally unlock everything.
Every week, host Kellie Blondel takes something we've all been told we absolutely have to do in business and actually looks into it. Where it came from. Who invented it. What the evidence says. And who's been making money from you believing it.
No agenda. No course to sell you at the end. Just the question, the research, and whatever we find when we actually look.
Who told you that. Why did they tell you that. And does it actually work.
If you've got something you've been told you have to do and you're not sure whether to believe it, send it in. Let's have a look at it together.
kellie@blondelandco.com

title: Catch the Imposter
author: OBOMEDIA ENTERTAINMENT
description:
Who is pretending, and why does everyone believe them? Catch the Imposter investigates the lies, schemes and soft spots where fraudsters thrive.

Each episode peels back the surface of impostors, con artists and cunning liars with sharp storytelling, forensic curiosity and interviews that expose the mechanics behind deception. Expect crisp reconstructions, analysis of motives, and practical signs to spot manipulative behavior—delivered with a skeptical, human voice that treats victims with respect and holds deception to account. Cacth the Imposter focuses on patterns of fraud, social engineering and fake identities so you can recognize the red flags before it's too late.

New episodes drop every day: Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday, Sunday at 9:00 AM. Episodes run focused and direct; listen for a short case breakdown, expert insight and clear takeaway tips in each installment.

This show is for curious listeners who want to understand how impostors operate—survivors, professionals who assess risk, and anyone tired of being duped by charm and false credentials. If you want to sharpen your instincts and learn the tactics deceivers use, this podcast is built for you.

Subscribe now and start spotting the signs. Keywords SEO: impostors, con artists, fraudsters, social engineering, fake identities

Have you ever questioned whether God truly loves you? Life's disappointments, grief, and struggles can make us wonder if God sees us or cares. In this first episode of Becoming Whole, I will share a heartfelt message about God's unchanging love for you and the hope you find in Jesus Christ. Through Scripture and gentle encouragement, you'll be reminded that you are seen, known, deeply loved, and never beyond God's grace. My prayer is that you'll leave encouraged to trust His love more deeply and take one more step toward becoming whole. 

God knew you long before the beginning of time. You are NOT a mistake.

Your circumstances do not determine God's love for you. God's love is constant, personal, and life-changing.

title: Jumping Off The Emotional Merry-Go-Round
author: gracenaj
description: Are you worn down by the relentless cycle of cheating, lies, manipulation, and chilling indifference? Hosted by a survivor of a 26-year marriage, Jumping Off the Merry-Go-Round is a refuge for those summoning the strength to leave—or struggling to rebuild after the deep wounds of emotional abuse, serial betrayal, and calculated gaslighting. This is a place where the truth is finally spoken: what it means to live beside someone untouched by your suffering and incapable of even the most basic empathy. Here, we tell the raw, unfiltered stories. We uncover the tactics that kept us doubting ourselves and bound to the chaos. And we create a powerful space for survivors to reclaim their voice, their clarity, and their worth. The spinning can stop here. You can step out of the confusion, break the cycle, and begin to reclaim your peace. You are not imagining it. You are not alone. And your healing can begin now.

title: Unprofessionalism
author: Dr Myriam Hadnes
description:
What does it really mean to be professional?


For generations, professionalism has been associated with competence, composure and control. But many of the unwritten rules we follow at work were built for a different world, one that asked us to hide uncertainty, suppress emotion and prioritise appearance over connection.


Each week, Dr Myriam Hadnes, behavioural economist, facilitator and founder of workshops.work, sits down with people who've questioned those rules. Their stories start with a professional risk. Few set out to be disruptive. Most simply reached a point where the conventional way of working no longer served them or the people around them.


Together they unpack the risks they took: admitting they didn't know, showing grief at work, challenging authority, asking for help, dressing differently, changing careers, trusting others, leading in ways they'd never seen modelled.


This podcast doesn't ask you to reject professionalism, or treat authenticity as some ideal to reach for. It’s about judgment: Which professional norms help us collaborate, lead and build trust? Which ones create distance between people? And how do we recognise the difference?


If you've ever felt the gap between who you are and who you think work wants you to be, this podcast invites you to look again. Not every professional rule needs breaking. But every one is worth questioning.

author: Mercy Abraham
description:
Life doesn’t always come with clear answers, and honestly, pretending it does doesn’t help anyone. Selah Sessions is simply a pause. A real conversation about the things we often try to move past too quickly: pain, doubt, ambition, identity, relationships. We'll talk about those questions that show up when it’s 2 a.m. and everywhere is quiet. I’m Mercy Abraham, and this is a space for honest, no-performance conversations. We’ll sit with hard truths, ask difficult questions, and talk about how faith actually holds up in real life; not just in the highlights. 

This isn’t a sermon. It’s a breath. A pause. So, come sit with me for a while.

title: X Incubator's Podcast
author: X Incubator
description:
X Incubator is an independent podcast sharing original insights and perspectives across three frontier domains:

Traditional Chinese Medicine vs Western Medicine
Real clinical cases examined through two lenses — how TCM identifies root causes and restores balance, and how Western medicine approaches the same condition. We present both systems honestly, letting the evidence speak for itself.

Alternative Medicine
Exploring treatment approaches outside conventional practice — often simpler, lower in cost, and worthy of serious consideration. Our aim is to expand the choices available to patients, 

not to replace professional medical advice.

Tesla Electricity Knowledge & Technology
Sharing perspectives on Nikola Tesla's work on longitudinal waves, scalar fields, and electromagnetic energy — fascinating territory that mainstream science has yet to fully explore.


X Incubator is for the independently minded — patients, researchers, and curious thinkers who enjoy seeing familiar questions from a fresh angle.

One independent voice. Endless possibilities.

title: Masters + Mentors: THE PODCAST

description: Welcome to Masters & Mentors: THE PODCAST - where doctors and practice owners can join high-impact conversations spanning clinical innovation, practice growth, leadership and more. Your host is Dr. Bill Bloink, a Heartland Dental founding partner and supported practice leader.

title: Unreal True Crime
author: Unreal True Crime
description: Welcome to Unreal True Crime.Step into the shadows where reality is more terrifying than fiction. This channel is dedicated to the deep, unsettling, and bone-chilling world of true crime, unsolved mysteries, and the darkest corners of human history. We don’t just tell stories—we dissect the twisted psychology of monsters, analyze cold cases that defy logic, and shine a light on the sinister secrets the world tried to bury.If you have an obsession with criminal psychology, forensic details, and the eerie atmosphere of pure horror, you’ve found your people. From notorious serial killers to bizarre disappearances and supernatural crimes that blur the line between myth and reality, we leave no stone unturned and no grave undisturbed.

title: Software Engineers Notebook
author: Ras
description:
Software engineering is not only about writing code. It is also about how we design systems, make technical decisions, work with teams, grow our careers, and learn from the mistakes we make along the way.
Software Engineers Notebook shares honest reflections from real experiences in software engineering. Episodes explore engineering practices, architecture, team dynamics, leadership, company culture, career decisions, and the everyday challenges behind building software.
There are no perfect answers here, just practical lessons, observations, and questions worth thinking abo

title: Aftershock Real Crime
author: Aftershock Real Crime
description: Welcome to Aftershock Real Crime – where we explore the darkest side of true crime, from brutal murders and twisted killers to chilling mysteries that remain unsolved

title: The Morning Mirror
author: Anthony Langdon
description: The Morning Mirror is a daily perspective reset for entrepreneurs, leaders, and anyone committed to growth. In 5–15 minutes, Anthony P. Langdon shares powerful insights on ownership, mindset, leadership, and performance to help you face the day with clarity and purpose. Before you change your circumstances, change the way you see them.

title: F*ck Who It May Concern
author: Mo & Big TC
description:
🎙️ F Who It May Concern Podcast


Welcome to F Who It May Concern.


This isn’t your typical podcast it’s a conversation.


Every week, Mo and Terry sit down to discuss celebrity news, relationships, music, trending topics, and the everyday situations people are really talking about. We don’t claim to have all the answers, but we do believe honest conversations and different perspectives matter.


Some weeks we’ll agree.

Some weeks we’ll completely disagree.


Either way, you’ll hear a woman’s perspective, a man’s perspective, and two people who aren’t afraid to challenge each other while keeping it real.


You’ll also hear our “To Whom It May Concern” segment, where we read anonymous listener letters and give our honest opinions on real-life relationship dilemmas, family issues, friendships, and life’s toughest decisions.


Then we’ll go Off Script, where anything is fair game from Red Flag vs. Green Flag to hot takes, music, internet debates, and whatever else is on our minds.


If you’re looking for fake debates, rehearsed conversations, or people trying to convince you they’re always right… this probably isn’t the podcast for you.


But if you’re looking for honest conversations, different perspectives, a few laughs, and a community where everyone has a voice…


Pull up a chair.


Welcome to F Who It May Concern.


📩 Have a story or need advice?


Send your anonymous letters to:


mailto:fwhoitmayconcernpodcast@gmail.com


Your letter could be featured on a future episode.


⸻


Tagline


Real Conversations. Different Perspectives. Your Voice Matters.


Or, if you want something with a little more attitude that matches the name:


Real Talk. No Filters. F Who It May Concern.


I still think “Real Conversations. Different Perspectives. Your Voice Matters.” is the strongest tagline because it captures exactly what you’ve told me over the course of this conversation. It reflects the heart of the show you and Terry bringing different viewpoints together and inviting listeners into the conversation.

title: Made in Spain
author: Made in Spain
description:
Whether you’re an expat chasing the dream, a traveller inspired by European elegance or a foodie seeking the perfect paella, Made in Spain is your insider’s guide to all things chic, cultural and quintessentially Spanish.


Join hosts Nalini Sharma and Laura Senior García for a glamorous mix of travel, food, fashion and the rich cultural narratives that make Spain a global icon of style and sophistication.


Nalini is a former Canadian TV presenter, who has previously covered red carpet and live events, and major news stories. She channels the same wit and curiosity to the Made in Spain podcast, offering sharp, unscripted takes on everything from Spanish traditions to expat surprises.


Laura, a seasoned leadership coach and global traveler, shares her deep, first-hand knowledge of Spain—not just as her birthplace, but as a country she continues to rediscover. With a British father and Spanish mother, she considers herself a global citizen with deep roots in Spain. Her insights connect Spain’s rich past with its modern evolution, offering a unique and personal perspective on life, culture, and luxury in Spain today.


Every episode of Made in Spain explores the country’s hidden gems and exclusive experiences, but it’s more than just a guide—it’s a conversation.


The show’s Slice of Life segment gives listeners an unfiltered peek into Nalini and Laura’s daily experiences – the joys, frustrations, and unexpected moments that make life in Spain, and beyond, full of surprises. Sometimes, it’s about the reality of settling into a new country – at other times, it’s about their travels, funny mishaps, or behind-the-scenes stories from researching the podcast. No matter the topic, listeners feel like they are right there with them, stepping into their world.

title: Radar | Daily Global News Briefing
author: OSINT TURK
description:
Welcome to OSINT TURK's Radar. Every weekday morning, our Radar podcast brings you the key insights shaping your world, before your day even begins. All you need to know as you start today, is here...

title: Speak Boldly, The Podcast
author: Lorraine  Connell
description:
Speak Boldly is more than a podcast—it's a movement that proves every voice matters.
Hosted by Lorraine Connell, founder of the Speak Boldly Showcase, each episode features courageous conversations with individuals who have discovered the power of sharing their story. From first-time speakers to seasoned leaders, guests reveal the moments that shaped them, the fears they overcame, and how finding their voice transformed their lives and the lives of others.
Whether you're dreaming of stepping onto a stage, speaking up in a meeting, advocating for a cause, or simply becoming more confident in your everyday conversations, Speak Boldly, The Podcast will inspire you to embrace your authentic voice.
Because being a speaker isn't about having the loudest voice or the biggest platform. It's about having the courage to share your story, knowing that someone else needs to hear it.
Join us each week for real stories, practical insights, and empowering conversations that remind us all: your voice has value, your story has purpose, and when you speak boldly, you create the possibility for change.

Practical entrepreneurship and leadership lessons for founders who refuse to stagnate. Hosted by Sid Mohasseb, USC professor, Author, and the Entrepreneur Philosopher, each episode breaks down one idea on growth mindset, decision-making, and personal development to help you build what matters.
Part of Anabasis Academy, a learning community for those who choose to evolve.

title: Chasing the Thread
author: James Allison
description:
Chasing the Thread begins with a thought that refuses to leave me alone.
Each episode takes one idea — about humanity, identity, AI, technology, society, consequence or the future — and follows it beyond the obvious answer. No forced certainty. No motivational slogans. Just honest thinking, uncomfortable questions, and a willingness to see where the thread leads.
Because sometimes the question you end with matters more than the thought you started with.

author: Kimbyrleigha
description: Every true crime case involves real people and real lives that are cut short, and True Crime with Kimbyr seeks to honor the victims of these unfathomable crimes by bringing facts to the forefront and sharing their stories with dignity and grace. An acclaimed storyteller on both her namesake and DARKLIVITY channels on YouTube, Kimbyrleigha brings empathy and sensitivity to the world of true crime, conducting in-depth investigations and approaching each case with the care they deserve.

title: Process over Pressure

description:
Process Over Pressure is a podcast for founders, operators, and builders who are in the trenches doing the real work.

Every episode gives a voice to the raw, real people who are unafraid of their failures — and have overcome them to build something that matters. Not polished highlight reels. Not curated wins. The full human journey.

If you've ever wondered whether the people you admire ever almost quit, the answer is yes. They did. And they kept going. These conversations are designed to give you the courage to keep going too.

Hosted by Chad Paris, founder of Stonefly Consulting Group, where the guiding principle is simple: process over pressure, every time.

New episodes weekly.

author: Lydia Maria Makrides and Zoë Matt-Williams
description:
What does Garfield have in common with medieval manuscripts? Why are pigeons the ultimate underdogs? What do children’s books teach us about authoritarianism?
Welcome to Groundhags. We’re Lydia and Zoë, two self-appointed Zeitgeistologists archiving the collective unconscious.
Over a b*stardised Greek coffee reading, we speak to artists and culture-makers about how they make and imagine. Weaving together cultural criticism and pop culture, each episode follows a theme in our guests’ work and what it reveals about the anxieties and desires bubbling beneath the surface of the zeitgeist.

Bender with Kevin is an exciting new podcast with a spotlight on LGBTQ+ relationships, and the real stories behind people like you. So jump on board, and get involved. 

Bender, the free gender-inclusive dating app! With a stylish, modern look and feel, easy to use, better functionality and large range of features, Bender will help you fulfil your desire to meet and date your ideal match wherever you are.

Bender is an app created by members of the LGBTQ+ community for members of the LGBTQ+ community. Just as ‘queer’ has been reclaimed, we have reclaimed the name ‘Bender’ in the same way. Also, who doesn’t like ‘going out on a bender’ on occasion?

description: Fast Brain, Full Heart is the UK's first podcast on twice-exceptionality, giftedness, and neurodiverse family life. Twice-exceptional children are gifted and also neurodivergent, and they are easy to miss when strengths mask struggles as much as struggles mask their strengths. Host Juliana Lax is a psychoeducation specialist and psychologist also the parent of a twice-exceptional daughter. She brings specialists, educators, and parents into conversations to challenge biases, discuss education systems and learn more about this fascinating, complex and rare profile. New episodes every Tuesday!

To help answer those questions, Express FM has partnered with Mountjoy and City of Portsmouth College to launch Workwise -  a podcast which helps young people, students, apprentices and job seekers explore careers, develop workplace skills and hear real stories from professionals across a wide range of industries .

Through rigorous exegesis and discursive reflection, Advocate Aaditya Bhatt examines the juridico-political substrata shaping contemporary statecraft and societal transformation. Curated for discerning audiences inclined towards epistemic depth, intellectual sophistication, and consequential thought beyond quotidian discourse.

We ask not just what happened, but why even the mightiest eventually fall. Subscribe to follow the next giant on its journey from peak to dust.

Stories that feel less like fiction and more like something whispered by a person who stil

description: This is DARKSIDE THRILLERS PRODUCTIONS, your monthly turn-on and tune-in to short thriller radio drama, coming your way the last Friday of each month.  I am your host, Elijah Summerfield, welcoming you to DARKSIDE THRILLERS, Season 1.    It begins with  BUS 212, a short, mystery/thriller by Gem Wodahl . Imagine you’re on a bus in the heart of the city.  Rush hour.  Gridlock.  As you look out your window, you see movement inside a first floor, condo window.  What you see terrifies you.  Someone is in trouble.  You watch.  You lock eyes.  You rush to the exit.  There’s no time to be safe…. Stop by and help us tidy up loose ends.

title: She Rose Anyway Podcast
author: Bea Baylor
description:
Some seasons break you wide open. The grief that will not move. The income that disappears overnight. The health scare that stops everything. The family betrayal you never saw coming. The moment you realize the life you built has shifted beneath your feet.

She Rose Anyway is for the woman who has lived through those moments and is still finding her way back to herself.

Hosted by Bea Baylor, Business Ecosystem Architect, best-selling author, and legacy strategist, this podcast is an honest conversation about what it actually takes to rise after loss, rebuild after collapse, and reclaim the life and purpose that was always meant for you. Bea brings her own story and the stories of women who refused to stay down through six powerful pillars: The Burning, The Pause, The Healing, The Rediscovery, The Rebuild, and The Rising.

This is not a highlight reel. This is the real work of women in their 40s, 50s, 60s and beyond who chose to keep going when everything said stop.

If you are in the middle of your comeback, this show was made for you.

RISE. RECLAIM. REBUILD.

author: Nicky Correa
description:
Life doesn't live in neat categories, this podcast doesn't either.


Welcome to nOnsense with Nicky, a podcast about everything that finds its way into my head. Some of it is thoughtful. Some of it is ridiculous. Most of it starts as a random thought that refuses to leave me alone. 


One episode might dive into business, branding and entrepreneurship. The next might be about moving across the world, raising a family, psychology, faith, culture, relationships, or an ordinary moment that somehow turns into a bigger conversation. Sometimes there are remarkable guests. Sometimes it's just me following a thought wherever it leads.


If you've ever caught yourself overthinking a conversation, questioning why the world works the way it does, or finding meaning in the most unexpected places, you'll probably feel right at home.


No scripts. No pretending to have all the answers. Just honest conversations, curious questions, a few laughs, and plenty of ramblings that accidentally make sense.

title: Echoes from the Field
author: STRYDE
description:
Echoes from the Field is a video series hosted by STRYDE’s CEO, Mike Popham, bringing you unscripted, real-world insights from the forefront of land seismic data acquisition.

In each episode, Mike sits down with leading geoscientists, field engineers, and exploration specialists - from STRYDE customers operating our nodal systems on the ground, to their end-users who rely on the seismic data to make critical subsurface decisions.

Through candid conversations, Mike uncovers the good, the bad, and the ugly of what real onshore seismic imaging projects entail. Our guests share first-hand experiences, discuss the operational challenges they face, and highlight the innovations changing the way seismic data is acquired and used.

From breakthroughs in technology and acquisition techniques, to honest reflections on productivity, safety, data quality, and project outcomes, this series offers a rare behind-the-scenes look at the realities of modern land seismic operations.

Hosted by Sarah Tourville and Dave McMullen, each episode unpacks the most viral, brilliant, and buzzworthy marketing moves through the lens of the Frenzy Framework: compelling emotional ideas, cultural context, contagious content, and fluid channels. While the spotlight often shines on big consumer campaigns, this podcast is made with B2B brand leaders in mind—showing how they can learn from their B2C counterparts to push boundaries, take creative risks, and build unforgettable brands. And sometimes, it’s the B2B world leading the charge in strategy, storytelling, and innovation. description:
The Borgata Trilogy is a limited podcast series featuring Rita Gigante and Louis Ferrante as they explore the true origins of the Mafia through Ferrante’s acclaimed Borgata Trilogy.


From the rugged mountains and villages of Sicily to the streets of New York City, this series traces the rise of organized crime across generations, uncovering the people, power struggles, traditions, and historical events that shaped one of the world’s most misunderstood criminal organizations.


Drawing from extensive historical research, personal insight, and candid conversation, Rita and Louis go beyond the myths and Hollywood portrayals to examine how the Mafia evolved, why it flourished, and the lasting impact it left on Italian American history and culture.


Part history lesson, part conversation, and part deep dive into a hidden world, The Borgata Trilogy reveals the real story behind the organization that changed America forever.

Vibrant Mind, Steady Feet is a unique audio experience recorded entirely on the move. Each 30-minute episode is a walk through nature, designed to bridge the gap between your racing thoughts and the present moment. We don't try to shut the noise down; we learn how to balance it.


Whether you're dealing with the chaos of an ADHD brain, a cluttered to-do list, or just the weight of a long day, this is your space to breathe. Put your headphones on, step outside, and find your rhythm. Let’s get moving.

title: Digital Trends in Web Design
author: Lina Miller
description:
Nearly a third of the 3.5 billion Google searches conducted daily are now done via voice, spearheaded by personal assistant devices. According to Search Engine Land, voice search is utilized for various purposes: obtaining general information (30%), acting as a personal assistant (27%), seeking local information (22%), and amusement (21%).

This trend will significantly impact website design. Websites must consider that voice search results typically comprise about 29 words, necessitating brevity and clarity in content. Prioritizing mobile-friendliness, incorporating video descriptions, and implementing Schema markup will be essential strategies in adapting to this shift. Dive into the world of webdesign with TemplateMonster and MonsterONE.

Because sometimes the greatest act of courage is letting go of comforting illusions and choosing the truth.Truth may be difficult, but false hope can be devastating. Choose truth. Choose life.

title: The Gavin And The Robot Show
author: ComedyCasts
description: This will be a talk show with Gavin Smith and GavBot, spanning across multiple seasons with twists, turns, and lots of learning! Hooray!!! It definitely won't have an overarching story. That's for losers. And if it's boring, then stop listening and go scroll on TikTok or something if you’re a brainrot kid. I don't really care anymore.

title: MAGIC IS REAL
author: Shannon Torrence
description: Magic Is Real, hosted by Shannon Torrence, a psychic medium, presents interviews with spiritual people about all things metaphysical: mediumship, near death and other spiritually transformative experiences, spiritual healing, astrology, manifesting and more.

title: Worderella Reads with Belinda Kroll
author: Belinda Kroll
description: Belinda Kroll's podcast is for readers who love gentle magic, Jane Austen banter, and all the swoons. Our TBR piles are stuffed with cinnamon roll heroes.

title: The Lesbian Take
author: MC Hutson Press
description: Lesbians (homosexual women) are facing a virulent new strain of modern homophobia, and the bitter irony is that it’s not coming from our old adversaries, but from people loudly proclaiming themselves our allies. Lesbian erasure is spreading like wildfire, and we will go extinct if we do not act. Now, more than ever, it is important for lesbians to take a stand, making and promoting content that is for us by us. On this podcast, we say what many lesbians know but are terrified of voicing. Our aim is to address lesbian issues and subjects that matter to us.

title: OpenInfra Live
author: OpenInfra Foundation
description:
Introducing: OpenInfra Live—an hour-long series sharing production case studies, open source demos, industry conversations, and the latest updates from the global open infrastructure community!
Airing live monthly on YouTube and posted to Spotify, YouTube Music, and Apple Music
Hosted by the OpenInfra Foundation: https://openinfra.org/

title: The Caregiver's Curriculum: A Podcast for Parents Raising Children with Complex Needs
author: It Takes a Village Special Needs Parent Coaching
description: The Caregiver’s Curriculum is a podcast for parents raising medically fragile and complex-needs children while navigating the emotional realities of special needs parenting and caregiving. Hosted by Carinne Mossa, each episode explores the invisible lessons of caregiving, including burnout, grief, chronic stress, advocacy, and rebuilding your identity while parenting through uncertainty.

title: Legacy Revival Center
author: Legacy Revival Center
description: We are a growing revival church in the Collinsville area. Our services are upbeat, the sermons are challenging, and the atmosphere is casual. There is something for all ages and situations in life to connect with. Whether you are a family of one or many we are looking forward to meeting you. Join us in Collinsville Illinois or learn more about us by visiting us on our Facebook and YouTube pages.

title: Robby Knows
author: Robby
description: The official podcast of Robby Knows. Who's Robby? He's just a little guy who tries to stay up to date on all the biggest stories in film, TV, and entertainment.

title: MariWithThe411 Podcast | Life’s Pursuit of building health, confidence, & purpose
author: Mariela Ayala
description:
No filters. No fluff. Just raw conversations, personal growth strategies, and soulful healing breakthroughs.
Discover the discipline behind success, the mindset shifts for transformation, and the power to rise when no one’s watching. Perfect for New leaders, ambitious creatives, and anyone ready to level up their life.
✨ Follow for life lessons, empowerment tools, and authentic self-discovery. Let’s grow through what we go through — together.
#MariWithThe411 #PersonalGrowth #HealingJourney #MindsetShift #EmpowermentPodcast #SoulfulConversations #SelfLove #BossEnergy #LifeTransformation #WomenWhoLead #MotivationPodcast #AuthenticLiving #LeadershipPodcast #SelfDiscovery #WellnessJourney

title: Between Bites
author: Dr Hosnieh Fathi
description:
Hi, I’m Hosnieh. For 25+ years, I’ve cared for people as a hospital doctor, medical leader, and now a lifestyle physician and health coach. I’m passionate about making good health accessible to everyone. This podcast explores how science, culture, travel, and everyday life shape our health. Through evidence-based medicine, practical insights, and inspiring conversations, we’ll discover simple ways to build healthier habits, prevent illness, and live happier, healthier lives.
First Episode Release Date : 22/ JULY/2026

title: Snarks and Crafts
author: Claire Wyckoff
description: The weekly comedy podcast where we talk shit while making shit. Host Claire Wyckoff (@HeyClaireWyckoff) mails a packet of art supplies to a friend from the creative industry… writers, comedians, producers, people who should know better…and they craft while they chat. The conversations? Unfiltered. The DIY projects? Absurd. From decorative screaming pillows to tampon sculptures to other DIY masterpieces nobody asked for. Part interview show. Part arts and crafts. All snark. New episodes every Monday, ok byeee.

title: Finding Us
author: Isabella C
description:
Welcome to Finding Us. 🤍 
Hosted by Isabella C., this is a cozy space for honest chats about healing, mental health, self-love, & becoming the best version of you. Let's find ourselves- together. ♡

title: Still Waters: Sleep Psalms & Scripture
author: Still Waters
description:
There's a quiet epidemic of sleepless nights and racing minds — and in the middle of that noise, we believe there's still a place of rest.
Still Waters exists for anyone lying awake in , anyone whose mind won't stop, anyone who needs to hear something steady and true before they close their eyes. Every episode is a slow, unhurried reading of the Psalms and other books of the Bible, straight from the King James Bible, layered over soft ambient music designed to help you drift off .

title: The Nature Connection
author: Don Torino
description: The Nature Connection with host Don Torino

title: Peele Out
author: Nathan Dorner
description: Peele Out is a film studies conversation on the deeper themes of writer/director Jordan Peele's projects, contextualizing his filmography. This project is created by Nathan Dorner in coursework at The University of Texas at Austin. Developed for the Final Project in the class American Horror Film (RTF 345) with Dr. Mirasol Enríquez.

title: The Blueprint with Mrs. K
author: Mrs. K
description:
Where ambitious women build businesses, lead with confidence, and build lives worth living.

Every meaningful business...

Every courageous decision...

Every lasting legacy...

Starts with a blueprint.

Welcome to The Blueprint with Mrs. K.

This isn't just another business podcast.

It's a place where honest conversations happen.

Where real stories become practical lessons.

Where faith, leadership, entrepreneurship, and life come together.

Each week, I'll pull up a chair and invite you into conversations about building a business, leading with confidence, navigating life's unexpected turns, and becoming the woman you're called to be.

I'll share my victories.

My mistakes.

The lessons I learned the hard way.

The stories that changed my life.

And the blueprints that helped me keep building even when I couldn't see the finished picture.

Because here's what I've learned...

We're not just building businesses.

We're building lives worth living.

Whether you're launching your first business, growing a team, rebuilding after a setback, or simply trying to figure out your next step...

There's a seat waiting for you here.

So grab your coffee.

Bring your journal.

Come in.

Take your seat.

Let's build what's next.

title: Shit Talk Corner Podcast
author: Zane Burns & Kelly Winterburn-Cox
description:
🎙️ Something new is starting, and we'd love and appreciate your support!

Zane and I have started a podcast! It's about nothing and everything all at the same time.

Each week, we'll dive into different topics, share funny stories, and talk about real-life moments. We'll steer clear of the classic first-date "no-no" topics, but just know... we're who we are, and we're always going to keep it real.

This podcast is raw, real, and a little messy... just like life. We definitely don't have it all figured out, and we're learning as we go. Every episode will get a little better, but we wanted to bring you along from the very beginning.

So laugh with us, shake your head at us, and enjoy the ride! If you like what you hear, please give us a listen, then like, subscribe, and follow. Your support means the world to us, and we can't wait to see where this crazy journey takes us. The best is yet to come! ❤️🎙️

title: MatNoise
author: Brian
description: MatNoise exists to preserve the stories, voices, and values of amateur wrestling. MatNoise isn't just about what echoes across the wrestling mat, its about the moments that echo through the lives of all those involved with wrestling.

title: Phil Spriggs Ministries
author: Phil Spriggs Ministries
description:
Phil Spriggs was a pastor with a heart and a passion for evangelism. His ministry was defined by a heart broken for the far from God, just as God’s heart breaks for His lost children. Phil knew that faith without works was dead (James 2:14) and trying to live a life for Christ without genuine spiritual decision and self examination was the road to destruction. Our congregations and pulpits are full of divided hearts, caught between conviction and full surrender to the conviction of the Holy Spirit.
​
​Phil faithfully preached for 33 years in 10 churches across 5 states until his sudden passing in 2025. This ministry endeavors to share his passionate teaching and fervent sharing of God’s Word. We pray that his timeless preaching will encourage the believer and share deliverance to the unsaved.  
​
Join with Phil Spriggs Ministries to help us continue his ministry and make heaven crowded. We can’t wait to hear your salvation stories.

title: Uncle Buddahs Neighborhood
author: Buddah
description: Uncle Buddah is a Radio Host and Community leader who interviews people from different communities who are doing amazing things!

title: Picking Up
author: Trash Turkey
description: Picking Up with Trash Turkey. A podcast about video game and other pickups!

title: Parish of Great Yarmouth Podcast
author: Parish of Great Yarmouth
description:
A Church of England parish in the Diocese of Norwich, worshipping across three churches in Great Yarmouth: the Minster, St Paul's, and St Mary's.
Each episode, our ministry team gather to reflect on the Christian journey — the Church year, scripture, and faith as it's really lived. Expect honest conversation, warmth, and a deep love for the God who meets us wherever we are.
Find us at gtyarmouthminster.org

title: Flights & Feelings
author: Tyshaia
description:
A place to remind you there's so much more to the world, and so much more to yourself.
Everybody has somewhere they come from, somewhere they're going, and a story about what happened in between. On Flights & Feelings, Tyshaia sits down with people from all walks of life to talk about where they come from, what they've discovered, and how stepping outside of what they knew changed them.


Our guests talk about their culture, identity, true feelings, and the experiences that changed the way they see themselves and the world around them.
It's about culture, curiosity, exploration, and the stories that remind us just how connected—and human—we all are.

title: JOELS DAILY WORDS OF LIFE
author: JOELS DAILY WORDS
description:
Joel's Daily Words of LifeStart every day with hope, faith, and encouragement through timeless biblical wisdom inspired by the uplifting teachings of Joel . Joel's Daily Words of Life is your daily source of motivation, spiritual growth, and positive living, helping you strengthen your faith and walk confidently in God's promises.Each episode delivers powerful, scripture-based encouragement designed to inspire your heart, renew your mind, and remind you that your best days are still ahead. Whether you're seeking peace during difficult times, motivation to pursue your purpose, or daily inspiration to overcome life's challenges, this podcast is here to uplift and empower you.Listen for:
  • Daily inspirational messages
  • Biblical encouragement and life lessons
  • Faith-filled motivation
  • Hope for every season of life
  • Positive Christian living
  • Spiritual growth and personal development
  • God's promises for everyday living
Join thousands of listeners who begin each day with a message of hope and encouragement. Subscribe now and let God's Word fill your heart with peace, purpose, and unwavering faith.New episodes uploaded regularly."Let faith rise above fear, hope overcome doubt, and God's promises guide every step of your journey."

title: Message Through The Bottle™
author: Jasmine Klapia
description:
Every person has a story. Every story carries a message. Sometimes, that message has the power to change a life.

Welcome to Message Through The Bottle™

Podcast, where real conversations inspire hope, healing, and personal growth.

I'm Jasmine Klapia—life and business coach, entrepreneur, and founder of the Message Through The Bottle™

movement dedicated to raising mental health awareness. In each episode, I share my own life experiences, the lessons they've taught me, and meaningful conversations with people from all walks of life.

You'll hear honest stories of resilience, love, loss, success, failure, healing, relationships, family, business, purpose, and the everyday challenges we all face. Some episodes feature guests joining me in the studio or on Zoom. Others include spontaneous conversations with people who simply have questions about life and are searching for guidance, perspective, or encouragement.

This podcast isn't about having all the answers. It's about creating a space where people feel seen, heard, and understood. Through coaching, authentic dialogue, and shared experiences, we'll discover that no matter how different our lives may seem, our emotions, struggles, and hopes often connect us in remarkable ways.

My greatest hope is that you'll find pieces of your own journey in these conversations. Maybe you'll recognize your past in someone else's story, find comfort in knowing you're not alone, or gain the courage to take the next step toward the life you deserve.

Because every bottle carries a message.

Every person has a voice.

And every story has the power to heal someone who needs to hear it.

title: Family Spotlight
author: Kaleb Ryan Vance
description: Family Spotlight is a genealogy-based podcast hosted by Kaleb Vance, where each episode uncovers the unique story of a real family. From oral histories to public records, we trace lineages, uncover forgotten pasts, and explore how personal histories intersect with broader historical moments. With care, research, and cultural respect, we shine a light on everyday legacies that deserve to be remembered.

title: Break the Box
author: Bianca
description:
Break the Box is a space for transformation, awareness, and real inner change.
This isn’t about quick fixes or surface-level motivation.
It’s about understanding what’s actually been holding you back — the patterns, emotions, and invisible limits that shape your thoughts, your actions, and your identity.
Because most of the time, it’s not that you don’t know what to do…
it’s that something within you is stopping you from doing it.
Each episode explores the deeper layers behind fear, procrastination, self-doubt, and the gap between intention and action — blending insight, real-life perspective,

title: Faith Before The Feed
author: Dee Wilson
description: Faith Before the Feed is a Christian podcast that helps listeners process today’s headlines through the truth of Scripture. Rather than fueling outrage or celebrating another person’s downfall, each episode encourages biblical wisdom, discernment, compassion, and prayer. Together, we’ll seek God’s perspective on current events, remember that He sees every act of evil, calls sinners to repentance, and will bring perfect justice in His time. Before we consume the world’s feed, we choose to feed our faith.

title: The Green Room Podcast
author: carljohnstone
description: News And Views From Wellingtons Theatre Scene

title: Pulse Partners - The SaaSial Media Agency
author: Clarity Media LLC
description: Pulse Partners is the SaaSial Media Agency podcast where Clarity Media founder Lee Hall takes small businesses from where they are to where they want to be. In our first episode, Lee shares the personal story behind why he built this — watching his father's insurance business fail while battling stage four cancer — and how that moment revealed a broken system affecting millions of small business families across America. He breaks down the three-part team model covering digital, media, and engagement, introduces the DNA Report, explains why being inside the business beats every remote solution on the market, and announces the upcoming podcast launch event and free Pulse Partners ebook. Real businesses. Real results. We're not remote. We're in the building.

title: Unexpected Journeys
author: Stacey Commer
description:
This podcast features stories of people who have had something unexpected happen in their life that has resulted in a change in their path. We also talk with people who are helping those who have had something unexpected happen. 

Hosted by Stacey Commer, a former journalist with more than 35 years in the industry.

title: Warrior Weekly
author: Kristy May and Katie Blevins
description: School is about more than report cards and calendars—it's about people, purpose, and partnership. Join Chilhowie Elementary Principal Kristy May and Assistant Principal Katie Blevins every Wednesday for Warrior Weekly, a quick podcast celebrating students, staff, and our community. We'll share the "why" behind school decisions, answer your questions, and highlight the stories that make CES special. Whether you're listening on your morning commute, in the car rider line, or over a cup of coffee, our goal is to help every family feel informed, connected, and part of the Warrior community.

title: The Order of the Stone
author: Chaosium Inc
description: The Stream of Chaos is back with another Call of Cthulhu adventure, The Order of the Stone!

title: Reading the Vine
author: Amanda
description: Two sisters. One bookstore wine bar. Endless opinions. Join us on Reading the Vine, where we pour a glass, crack a spine, and talk about the books we can't put down, the business we're building, and all the things in between. Part book club, part happy hour, all heart.

title: Emergency Exit
author: Thomas And Evelyn
description: Expensive tea is worth it, and so is our standard for madness. The best maps have instructions for driving to or from chaos. We push our limits as defined by our NDAs. Concerning constantly about our concerning conversations, our biggest concern is wondering what actual concerns us. We'll handle your chaos, In exchange for handling ours. We've made it clear where the emergency exit is because we vow and cherish your well-being. So when you need to run far away from us, just remember, you're listening to the emergency exit.

title: WellKit
author: FitKit
description: Well Kit is a holistic wellness podcast supported by FitKit, focused on mind, body, and soul. We bring together experts and voices from the region to explore mental health, physical well-being, and wellbeing in the workplace —one meaningful conversation at a time.

title: The Soveryns
author: Auriane Ségol
description:
Tired of performing womanhood? Of chasing beauty standards, feeling not enough as you are, worrying about your appearance 24/7, and feeling you have to fix everything but you don't even know why?
Welcome to The Soveryns. 
A soveryn is a woman sovereign of herself — free from beauty pressure, free to choose for herself.
Each episode exposes the invisible conditioning behind how you feel about your face, your body, your worth. No shame. No throwing out your makeup. Just clear eyes, a quieter inner critic, and the slow return of you.
Press play. Come home to yourself.

title: The Rally Cap Podcast
author: Bryan Davis and Ronan Patel
description: Two 14 year olds having a good time talking baseball

title: Maurice Brown Inspires Podcast
author: Maurice brown
description:
Welcome to the Maurice Brown Inspires Podcast

The Maurice Brown Inspires Podcast is a place for encouragement, personal growth, and meaningful conversations that help you become the best version of yourself.

Each episode is designed to inspire you to overcome challenges, build confidence, strengthen your mindset, and pursue your goals with purpose. Along the way, we'll explore topics like motivation, entrepreneurship, outdoor adventures, mental wellness, faith, life lessons, relationships, and practical strategies for creating a life you love.

Whether you're looking for inspiration to start something new, encouragement to keep going, or real conversations that make a difference, you're in the right place.

On this channel you'll find:

  • Inspiring conversations and interviews
  • Personal growth and mindset tips
  • Entrepreneur and business insights
  • Outdoor adventure stories and experiences
  • Mental wellness and self-care discussions
  • Motivation to help you take your next step

If you're ready to grow, stay inspired, and join a positive community, subscribe and turn on notifications so you never miss a new episode.

New episodes every week.

Remember: Every day is another opportunity to grow, inspire others, and make a positive impact.

Subscribe today and let's grow together!

title: Truth + Conversation
author: Gary John Bishop
description: Truth + Conversation - where philosophy and real-life problems collide. Without the fluff.

title: COGPLEXITI: Decision Analysis for Operational Leaders.
author: Jayson Coil
description: Leadership in complex environments is a set of practiced disciplines — not innate talent, and not something experience alone produces. Work the Decision is about how high-consequence organizations decide under pressure and incomplete information — and how they verify what they think they know. Hosted by Jayson Coil, Operations Section Chief and author of the Operational Leader's Field Guide (Cogplexiti, 2026). Built for leaders anywhere the consequence is measured in hours. More at cogplexiti.com.

title: The Coheed Chronicles
author: Joel
description: Exploring the music & lore behind every track in Coheed & Cambria's catalog.

title: GabiTalksPolitics
author: Gabriel Raimondo
description:
Jersey Election 2026
Take a listen to the podcast where we talk everything Jersey politics in the lead up to the 2026 Jersey Election. Hosted by Gabriel Raimondo, the youngest candidate in the election. follow along as he talks about social and economical issues effecting the island and interviews other candidates, states members and local influencal names.

title: The Opposite View
author: The Opposite View
description: A Podcast channel by Del Amitri fans, for Del Amitri fans....

title: Starting Tomorrow
author: Hannah and Phil
description:
Welcome to Starting Tomorrow.

If you’ve ever said, “I’ll start tomorrow,” you’re in the right place.


This podcast isn’t about having life figured out. It’s about what happens before you do.

Every Sunday, we’ll sit down and have an honest conversation about the habits we want to build, the ones we’re trying to break, and the promises we’ve been making to ourselves for far too long.


This week, we’re starting.


For us, that means less drinking, no more junk food, no more ordering takeout every time life gets stressful, and making movement part of our lives again.


Not because we’ve suddenly become disciplined.


Because we’re ready to start, again, tomorrow 😏.


Each week, we’ll tell you what we’re working on, where we succeeded, where we failed, and what we learned. No pretending. No pretending we never slipped. No pretending we have the answers.


Just two people who’ve grown up together, lived through some incredible highs and some really difficult lows, trying to build a life we’re proud of, one tomorrow at a time.


If you’ve been waiting for the perfect Monday, the perfect time, or the perfect version of yourself…


Come start tomorrow with us.
